programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 3
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Choctaw - Part 4
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour goes to Durant, Oklahoma for Midwest poker action for WPT Choctaw. A $2 million prize pool is up for grabs as Season XV WPT Choctaw final tablist Craig Varnell plays for his first WPT title and $380,000 at HyperX Esports Arena.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 2
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 3
programme.desc: The best poker players in the world at HyperX Esports Arena to play for $440,000 and the title of \\"Champion of Champions.\\" WPT commentator Tony Dunst is at the final table to battle against Ole Schemion, Nick Schulman, and more!
programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 3

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 4

programme.sub-title: Baccarat Crystal WPT Tournament of Champions - Part 4

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: Bellagio High Roller - Part 4
programme.desc: Top-tier talent is in Las Vegas to play for $432,000 and the WPT Bellagio High Roller title. Join Phil Hellmuth and Vince Van Patten in the booth with Tom Marchese, Jake Schindler, Sam Soverel, and David Peters battling on the felt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT1
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT2
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Tournament Of Champions - PT3
programme.desc: World Poker Tour ignited the global poker boom with a unique television show based on a series of high-stakes tournaments. WPT events turned Gus Hansen into the Great Dane and Daniel Negreanu into Kid Poker, and created dozens of poker-made millionaires.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 2
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 2

programme.title: World Poker Tour: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 3
programme.desc: Maria Ho, Alex Foxen, Nick Petrangelo, and WPT Champion Sam Panzica are all at this $25,000 buy-in final table looking to win $424,000 and this exclusive title at Commerce Casino in Los Angeles.
programme.sub-title: LAPC Rockstar Energy High Roller - Part 3

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Uruguay - Part 1
programme.desc: Six players enter the luxury Enjoy Punta Del Este resort looking to win $110,000 and this prestigious WPT title with 410 players down to six.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Uruguay - Part 2
programme.desc: Six players enter the luxury Enjoy Punta Del Este resort looking to win $110,000 and this prestigious WPT title with 410 players down to six.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Uruguay - Part 3
programme.desc: Six players enter the luxury Enjoy Punta Del Este resort looking to win $110,000 and this prestigious WPT title with 410 players down to six.

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Rockstar Energy Cash Game - Part 1
programme.desc: Hollywood's Jennifer Tilly sits down at a high stakes cash game with WPT Champions Olivier Busquet and Art Papazyan along with high roller Bryn Kenney to play at Commerce Casino. Hundreds of thousands are on the table in Los Angeles!
programme.sub-title: WPT Rockstar Energy Cash Game - Part 1

programme.title: World Poker Tour: WPT Rockstar Energy Cash Game - Part 2
programme.desc: Hollywood's Jennifer Tilly sits down at a high stakes cash game with WPT Champions Olivier Busquet and Art Papazyan along with high roller Bryn Kenney to play at Commerce Casino. Hundreds of thousands are on the table in Los Angeles!
programme.sub-title: WPT Rockstar Energy Cash Game - Part 2

programme.title: Andromeda: Utgangsstrategier
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev og Tyr krasjer land etter å ha rømt en gjeng Nietzscheans, men møter snart en ny trussel: Revs behov for å mate..

programme.title: Andromeda: Et hjerte for falskhet innrammet
programme.desc: Mannskapet må stjele en juvel som er i sentrum av en strid mellom en driftseier og Than. Beka faller for en sikkerhetssjef som tidligere var en tyv.

programme.title: Andromeda: Pitiless as the Sun
programme.desc: Andromeda svarer på et nødanrop når et lasteskip blir angrepet

programme.title: Andromeda: Siste samtale ved den ødelagte hammeren
programme.desc: Mannskapet ser etter en mistet Commonwealth-leder som har skjult seg.
programme.sub-title: Siste samtale ved den ødelagte hammeren

programme.title: Andromeda: Altfor menneskelig
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka og Trance går sammen med Rommie for å finne ut om et våpen som utvikles på en planet som mistro AI.

programme.title: Andromeda: Una Salus Victus
programme.desc: Andromeda har til oppgave å eskortere medisinske skip trygt gjennom Drago-Kazov-rommet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Hjemmebranner
programme.desc: En planet av Commonwealth-overlevende ledet av Dylans tidligere forlovede blir invitert til å bli med i det nye Commonwealth, men når de stemmer for ikke å bli med, blir Magog mistenkt for å ha spilt skittent.

programme.title: Andromeda: Inn i labyrinten
programme.desc: En avgrunnsagent prøver å lokke Harper til å bli med i Magog

programme.title: Andromeda: Prinsen
programme.desc: Når de redder en ung prins fra et opprør som dreper resten av familien hans, blir Dylan og Tyr bedt om å være hans rådgivere.

programme.title: Andromeda: Bunker Hill
programme.desc: Dylan og hans nye Commonwealth-flåte tar på seg Drago-Kazov-flåten, men synes den er mye større enn forventet.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ouroboros
programme.desc: Magog-eggene i Harper begynner å klekkes, så teamet bygger en Tesseract-maskin

programme.title: Andromeda: Lava og raketter
programme.desc: Dylan overtar en turistpram i et forsøk på å unnslippe leiesoldater.

programme.title: Andromeda: Vær alle mine synder husket
programme.desc: En kroppsidentifikasjon går galt når det viser seg at Bekas tidligere mannskap ikke er død.

programme.title: Andromeda: Mayflies dans
programme.desc: Andromeda redder døende mennesker fra en drift, men de blir snart til zombier som blir kontrollert av en bikube.

programme.title: Andromeda: I himmelen er nå tre
programme.desc: Motoren til skapelsen er i stand til å omskrive universet i henhold til eierens ønsker. Dylan, Beka og Trance må skaffe det før noen med mørke planer får det.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ting vi ikke kan endre
programme.desc: Et svart hull slår Dylan ut og sender ham inn i en alternativ virkelighet med kone og barn.

programme.title: Andromeda: The Fair Unknown
programme.desc: Mannskapet redder en av de tapt grunnleggerne av Commonwealth, men oppdager at hun kan være mer trøbbel enn hun er verdt.

programme.title: Andromeda: Dyrets mage
programme.desc: Et mytologisk rommonster prøver å spise Andromeda.

programme.title: Andromeda: Ridderen, døden og djevelen
programme.desc: Dylan prøver å frigjøre en flåte med fangede skip, men flåten er ikke sikker på at den vil bli frigjort. AI-ene deres frykter at nye kapteiner vil slavebinde dem.

programme.title: Andromeda: Immaculate Perception
programme.desc: Genitter angriper Tyrs kone og koloni.

programme.title: MTV Catfish
programme.desc: Catfish, det populære MTV-programmet som samler par som bare har hatt kontakt via skjermer. I løpet av måneder skal de visstnok ha forelsket seg, men hva skjer når de møtes i virkeligheten for første gang?

programme.title: Forensic Files: Point of Origin
programme.desc: In 1984, California firefighters battled ten arson fires in three weeks. When cigarettes and a scrap of paper connected the case to similar fires further north, the hunt was on for a dangerous pyromaniac.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Seeds for Doubt
programme.desc: In 2002, a small community in upstate New York was devastated when Patty Wlasiuk died in a truck accident. But burdock seed pods found in her hair and on her clothes indicated that this was no accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Saving Face
programme.desc: When a woman disappeared without a trace, there were two possible explanations: kidnapping or murder. Careful investigation, a forensic artist and DNA profiling enabled police to find a single suspect, who was known to prey upon vulnerable women.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Northern Exposure
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: Prompted by news of a flight attendant's brutal murder, the son of a previous victim contacts police. Both murders have similar MOs, and biological evidence proves that these were serial killings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A two-man shrimp boat sinks when a fast-moving, violent storm strikes the Louisiana coast. The captain drowns, but the deckhand is rescued fourteen hours later. The crewman is hailed as a hero — until the captain's body is discovered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: When a wealthy real estate tycoon goes missing, it appears to be foul play. In his will, he leaves instructions in case he should die under violent circumstances — which were carried out after a hiker comes across his bullet-ridden skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: Police are led on a wild goose chase when the wife of a prominent banker is kidnapped. An entomologist's unexpected discovery leads to a new suspect — and the realization that ordinary office equipment can leave extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: It would take 46 years, handwriting analysis and new fingerprint technology to solve the 1957 murders of two California police officers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: A man riding a bicycle was fatally injured in what police believed to be a hit-and-run accident. Tiny clues found at the scene created a picture of the vehicle which struck him and led police to its driver.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search when the mother of two young children went missing. Twenty years after her body was found, new technology recontextualized old evidence and pointed directly to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: When hunters reported finding a skull in a Texas canyon, police immediately began an investigation. With a forensic artist's reconstruction, police eventually learned the victim's identity. Now all they had to do was find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: A married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a mini-vacation in Key West. The wife went missing and police searched every square inch of the island; they found nothing but a pair of sandals which might have belonged to her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two young children was found dead in her bedroom. Her death was ruled a suicide — but when investigators learned she had almost died in a house fire three years earlier, they decided to take another look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: In 1991, when the wife of a serviceman was brutally murdered in the Philippines, investigators had to reassemble a tiny computer disk that had been cut to pieces in order to find the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: When a fire destroyed most of a home and a young boy went missing, police organized the largest search in the history of their small town. First the boy's backpack was discovered five miles from home, then his body was found 50 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman was dispatched to what he thought would be a routine traffic accident — until he looked in the car. He had seen hundreds of accidents, but none with as much blood as this.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up On Crime
programme.desc: The decomposed body of a young woman was discovered in a Bakersfield irrigation canal. If there was trace evidence, it had been washed away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile caused the Baton Rouge Police Department to search for the wrong man. The real perpetrator may have eluded arrest, had it not been for a molecular biologist who painted DNA picture of the suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician returned home from the hospital and found his wife on the bathroom floor. She was covered with blood and not breathing. He tried unsuccessfully to revive her, staining his clothes with her blood in the process.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A Modesto, California teenager goes missing. With no signs of struggle in her home, police suspect she has simply run away — until her naked, bruised body is discovered in a ditch 20 miles away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: When police recovered the submerged car of a missing man, they expected to find his body — but it wasn't there. The investigation that followed would uncover an obsession turned deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Emergency dispatch received a call from a man who said his girlfriend shot and killed herself. The autopsy revealed that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted, and the evidence on her body would give police a golden opportunity to catch her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: When a Native American woman is brutally killed in the desert of New Mexico, her killers leave a crime scene rich in forensic evidence: tire tracks, shoe impressions and even the murder weapons.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: A brilliant young architect falls ill and dies just before she is to testify in a criminal trial. The autopsy reveals she'd been poisoned with arsenic. Investigators must determine who had a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: When a dry cleaner employee is raped and murdered in her store, police turn to forensic science for the answers they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: The murder of an eccentric millionaire was not entirely unexpected; he flaunted his wealth and cared little for personal security. The evidence at the crime seemed to indicate robbery, but investigators wondered if there was something more.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cop Out
programme.desc: When a college student is found dead, evidence suggests that he knew his killer. With just three hairs and some microscopic cells, police unravel a web of lies and find the motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Summer Obsession
programme.desc: In an affluent suburb of Philadelphia, police were called to the scene of what appeared to be an accidental drowning. The investigation gradually focused on one suspect who had more than a million reasons to want the victim dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: When two women from the same town were murdered in the same way, police feared a serial killer was on the loose. At first they thought the victims had nothing in common until they found tiny clues linking them to the same man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss, Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil
programme.desc: When a popular disc jockey was found murdered in a community garden, police swung into action. A sniffer dog and a blood spatter expert led police to the killer, who had been much closer than they realized.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Brotherhood of Hate
programme.desc: In 1984, a tragic murder led agents into the frightening world of domestic terrorism. Law enforcement vowed to dismantle the violent faction that claimed responsibility.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The World Trade Center Bombing
programme.desc: Terrorist bombings are what happen in other countries. Not here in the United States. And yet, in 1993, it happened in New York City.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Deadly Mission
programme.desc: When a family was murdered in Arkansas, it seemed like an isolated event. But soon the crime was revealed to be part of an ever-widening circle of violence that defined a new age of domestic terrorism.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Melissa Brannen: Missing
programme.desc: In 1989, residents of a close-knit apartment community in Virginia gathered for a holiday celebration. For Tammy Brannen and five-year-old daughter Melissa, Christmas was always a special time. Then without warning, the little girl was gone.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Temple of Fear
programme.desc: In Miami, the discovery of a mutilated body sent investigators on the trail of a deadly cult. But agents found a wall of silence around the cult's members. Potential witnesses, terrified of reprisals, refused to talk.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Without Mercy
programme.desc: Despite what you see in the movies, most bank robbers come in quietly, pass a note, and slip away. They want cash, not bloodshed. But in Richmond, Virginia, a pair of gunmen entered a bank with their guns blazing.

programme.title: The FBI Files: No Remorse
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Hunter's Target
programme.desc: Over a thousand hunting accidents are reported in the United States each year. Fewer than ten percent of them are fatal. But when one hunter's death seemed suspicious, the FBI was called in to investigate.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Killing Spree
programme.desc: In 1984, in South Florida, a rapist and murderer was on the loose. The killer was a ruthless and terrifying predator, the newest member of an infamous group known as serial killers.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Cracking The Cartel
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dead Run
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The FBI Files: First and Kennedy Street Crew
programme.desc: In the early 1990's, Washington, D.C., became the murder capital of the nation. Few were left untouched by gang violence, which was ignited by the drug trade. By 1994, that violence would strike at the very heart of law enforcement.

programme.title: The FBI Files: The Coffee Shop Murders
programme.desc: At a coffee shop in Washington, DC, three employees were shot to death. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong or an act of cold-blooded vengeance?

programme.title: The FBI Files: Dishonored
programme.desc: Shirley Russell was determined enough to reach the rank of Captain in the United States Marine Corps. When this officer turned up missing, her colleagues refused to believe she had gone AWOL. It was unclear whether Captain Shirley Russell was alive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: Evil Intent
programme.desc: Drops of blood and a torn screen were all that's left to tell authorities what happened to a woman in Indiana. The 21 yr. old victim was taken from her home on a spring morning. She appeared to have no real enemies, there was no clear motive.

programme.title: The FBI Files: A Stranger in Town
programme.desc: She appeared on the highway in the spring, a young woman, her life cut short, her past and her identity a mystery. Only by finding out who she was could we ever hope to find her killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files: When Seconds Count
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Predators and Parasites
programme.desc: For the forensic entomologist, the insects that nest in dead bodies are like tiny witnesses to a crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Military Justice
programme.desc: The Naval Criminal Investigative Service uses forensic science to solve three perplexing murders and fulfill their motto: "To the living we owe respect; to the dead, we owe the truth."

programme.title: The New Detectives: Bodies of Evidence
programme.desc: It is difficult to convict a murderer if the body can't be found. But forensic science is finding ways to do it. Devious killers can think up many was to dispose of their victim's remains, but they are often no matches for investigators.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Deadly Target
programme.desc: Ballistics: A corpse is found with a gunshot wound to the head; the weapon lies next to the victim. It looks like suicide, but could it be murder? It's a question best solved by ballistics experts.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Loved To Death
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Betrayed
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives: False Witness
programme.desc: When a murder is committed and deceit clouds the evidence, investigators turn to science and technology to uncover the truth and expose a murderous lie and capture the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Face Of Tragedy
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Coroner's Casebook
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Cold Blooded
programme.desc: Time of death is an important consideration in a murder investigation, but when a killer freezes, burns, or grinds his victim, even the most skilled medical examiner would be at a loss about how to calculate it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: To Kill Again
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Proof Of Innocence
programme.desc: DNA analysis overturns the convictions of three men who have spent years behind bars, paying for crimes they did not commit.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Grave Discoveries
programme.desc: Some cases simply can't be solved with current technology or with the evidence at hand. But that doesn't mean they'll remain unsolved forever.

programme.title: The New Detectives: A Federal Offense
programme.desc: When there's a difficult case to crack  whether it involves drugs, arson, or weapons  the investigators and scientists of the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco and Firearms have the means to crack it.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Living In Terror
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Women Who Kill
programme.desc: Men don't have a monopoly on murder, but it's still extraordinary when women kill. Though female killers are as deadly as males, they choose less violent methods.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Soldier Stories
programme.desc: This show profiles the work of world-renowned forensic experts as they work to tell the stories of the young men who went to war (from the French and Indian war to Vietnam) and never came back.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2
programme.desc: As Sean continues his investigation at The Ring O Bells pub, he finds that out that there is more haunting this location, than just the spirits lurking behind the bar.
programme.sub-title: Haunting of The Sad Cavalier at The Ring O Bells - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Blues Haunting at The Winslow Hotel
programme.desc: Bex, Sean and the team head to Liverpool and investigate a very famous hotel, which Everton football club supporters have frequented for over 100 years and it would appear that some of the guests have never checked out.
programme.sub-title: The Blues Haunting at The Winslow Hotel

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: I Hear a Baby Crying
programme.desc: The team investigate the Market Hotel in Bolton. Believed to be haunted by the lost soul of a previous landlord and a guest who likes to make herself known. They make contact with spirits from the other side and witness first hand paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: The Knight Ghost
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension investigate the ruins of Liverpool castle, Bolton and encounter a ghost on camera! Could this be the most compelling paranormal evidence ever?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle
programme.desc: Sean heads to Stanton Moor, Derbyshire and encounters a portal to the spirit dimension within a mystical stone circle, used for witchcraft and occult practices. With no outside interference, the activity is off the scale.
programme.sub-title: Dimensional Gateway of The Nine Ladies Stone Circle

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Flying Solo: Ghostly Dimension at Ye Olde Boars Head
programme.desc: Sean investigates one of the UK's most haunted pubs, with is very own dungeon. Haunted by multiple spirits, it appears to be very active and Sean is not prepared for what happens to Paul.
programme.sub-title: Ghostly Dimension at Ye Olde Boars Head

programme.title: Ghost Dimension: A Unexpected Haunted Adventure
programme.desc: The team heads to Lydiate Abbey to investigate claims of a ghostly white lady and stumble upon a totally hidden gem deep in the woods, which has its own spirits haunting.

programme.title: Past Hunters: Ordsall Hall
programme.desc: Ordsall Hall is over 820 years old. It has been put to many uses including a family home, working men's club and church hall. With over 15 hauntings and many sightings, Ordsall Hall will certainly keep the team busy.

programme.title: Past Hunters: The Haunted Parade
programme.desc: Derek Acorah’s The Past Hunters travel to Hoylake and investigate a building known as The Parade. Dating back to 1909, this once former school, still seems to have ghostly pupils and teachers taking class.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 1
programme.desc: Many urban explorers have encountered paranormal activity inside of the building, including child like figures, unexplained voices and strange knocking sounds. Will anything from the ghost dimension make contact?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Norris Green Mansion Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension's Bex and Sean investigate Norris Green Mansion. A 17th Century building, which is believed to hold some of the most haunted spirits in Liverpool. Will they make contact its ghostly entities tonight?

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 1
programme.desc: Bex and Sean are joined by a special guest as they investigate an abandoned home full of spirits in Liverpool.
programme.sub-title: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension Lockdown: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 2
programme.desc: Ghost Dimension encounter something paranormal in this exclusive unseen footage from their invetsigation of the Soul Less House in Liverpool.
programme.sub-title: Soul Less House of Ghosts - Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex begin their chilling investigation at the historic Clifton Hall Masonic Temple. Hidden behind closed doors for over a century, this sacred space holds more than just ritual secrets. They explore the eerie corridors and lodge rooms.
programme.sub-title: Secrets of the Masonic Temple – Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: The investigation continues as Bex and Sean split up to face the darkness alone inside Clifton Hall. From intelligent knocking and voices to the chilling sound of a child and unseen footsteps on the carpet.
programme.sub-title: Secrets of the Masonic Temple – Part 2

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In a church reborn as a gym, something old still lingers in the shadows. Sean and Bex investigate Dream Body Gym inside the former Manor Church — where whispers echo through stairwells, music box melodies drift through empty rooms.
programme.sub-title: Haunted Strength – The Church Gym Investigation

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Deep in the woods on the outskirts of Liverpool lie the crumbling remains of a forgotten gatehouse — and the land surrounding it is said to be cursed. As Sean and Bex begin their nighttime investigation, unsettling activity begins to unfold.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: Sean and Bex head to one of Leeds’ oldest public libraries, where the silence hides more than just books. Reports of shadow figures, unexplained voices, and a terrifying presence in the basement have kept rumours alive for decades.

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: In the first of a five-part investigation inside the historic Greenfield Valley Heritage Park, the team explores the eerie ruins of the old mills. Known for reports of ghostly children, unexplained footsteps, and phantom knocks on stone walls.
programme.sub-title: Greenfield Valley: Echoes of the Mill : Part 1

programme.title: Ghost Dimension
programme.desc: As the team delves deeper into the Valley Mills, subtle sounds begin to stir the silence—unheard by the cameras, but felt by those present. A chilling metallic swing echoes through the empty building with no visible source.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did
programme.desc: Shannan claims Tim fathered her child. He doesn't buy it because he doesn't recall having sex with her! Later, Ayana is furious that her boyfriend Patrick denies their son!
programme.sub-title: He Said Give Your Baby Away and You Did

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This
programme.desc: Is Khadisa's boyfriend Chad cheating on her with her own sister? Will Maya's ex trust her and her current beau with their infant son?
programme.sub-title: I'm a Survivor, but I Can't Take This

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him
programme.desc: Will Nadia and Woody's lie detector test results prove that they were negligent and deserved to lose custody of their children? Then, can Steve set the record straight about Josette's daughter?
programme.sub-title: Your Kids Need Their Mom, But You Chose Him

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: The 1,000th Episode!
programme.desc: On the 1,000th episode, we'll bring you all of the crazy confessions, explosive meltdowns, chair throws, funny moments and the heartfelt stories that have made this show special!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Saw Right Through You
programme.desc: Today on Steve Wilkos, Maurice wants to prove to his girlfriend that he's faithful. Plus Chuanhtee says fed up with Ladi's cheating accusations! Watch as the truth is revealed!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Have Two Husbands
programme.desc: Jessica married Gian after a five-month relationship. With a baby on the way, everything seems to be going great for the couple, except Jessica is married to another man, Michael!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: An Explosive DNA Story
programme.desc: Teneal and Richard are telling different tales, each alleging the other is unfit to parent! The truth will come down to a lie detector test, and the results will be shocking!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.
programme.desc: Today Danny is finally ready to face the missing man in his life and get answers to lifelong questions. Steven offers a number of excuses for not seeing his son, but can he redeem himself?
programme.sub-title: Steve, I Can't Face The Truth.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Two years ago, Latisha and her boyfriend were found shot to death in their car. Latisha’s mother Nancy believes her ex-husband Kenneth was involved. Who is responsible for their deaths?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant
programme.desc: Megan is 14 and pregnant with 19 year old Michael’s baby, but he doesn’t see any problems with this situation. Laurie, Megan’s mother, turns to Steve to help get through to her!
programme.sub-title: I Got a 14 Year Old Pregnant

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve, Get Him Out!
programme.desc: Kelly’s ex-husband Nikki continues to haunt her. He went to jail for killing her 2 week old son and is now dating her 18 year old daughter! Can Steve get Nikki out of their lives forever?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother in Denial
programme.desc: When ordinary people need help, Steve Wilkos is ready to answer the call. Watch as Steve helps ordinary people stand up for themselves and fight for what he believes in order to promote justice for all.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: A Mother's Rage
programme.desc: Three years later, Elizabeth still carries strong doubts about Manny's intentions with her family and her husband Rodney is caught in the middle. Is Manny innocent?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Mommy Hurt Me
programme.desc: Stephanie’s drug addiction led her to neglect and abuse her kids. Scott’s fiancée stepped up as a mother and Stephanie failed multiple drug tests, he doesn’t want her near the kids, but wants her to atone for her wrongs!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?
programme.desc: Maria claims that her son’s ex Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says Maria is a racist and angry over raising her grandchild in a Hispanic home!

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: What Happened to My Baby?
programme.desc: Baby Garrett died of an oxycodone drug overdose while in Sharon’s care. His mother Casey left him with Sharon so she could visit her husband Kenneth in the hospital. Who’s responsible?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...
programme.desc: Sharina thinks that Clarence is cheating on her because he’s always out late. Plus, Chrystal doesn’t want Earnie’s ex Tenyia to live with them just because she’s the mother of his child.
programme.sub-title: Wait! Don't Read The Results Yet Steve...

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is My Husband the Abuser?
programme.desc: Joyia is desperate to keep her friend Stephanie from going back to her problematic ex Scott. But she still loves him! Will she have the strength to leave him?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Steve Outraged!
programme.desc: Jack is worried about his grandchildren because his daughter-in-law Carol has been negligent and hot-tempered. Then, Kendra explains why she suddenly put Corey’s baby up for adoption.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Murder My Daughter?
programme.desc: Teenager Megan lives with her older controlling boyfriend Rick. Megan cannot attend school, find a job, or even eat without his OK! Can her aunt and Steve get through to her?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Did You Fake Your Pregnancies?
programme.desc: Dennis claims his ex-girlfriend Kendal keeps tied down with pregnancy lies! He wants to know if their daughter is even his! Will Steve’s DNA test results finally let them move on?

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Results Revealed: Did She Cheat?
programme.desc: Justin is convinced that girlfriend Lainie has been cheating on him, and more importantly that he’s not the father of their child. But his own insecurities have led him to turn violent. Also, Steven doubts whether Ashley’s child is his.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: .357 Magnum
programme.desc: The murder of a popular teen at a crowded house party sends Kenda down a winding road paved with lies, misdirection, and innuendo.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Rearview Mirror
programme.desc: When a retired military man runs over a pedestrian, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda to determine if it was bad brakes or bad intent.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Shot Through the Heart
programme.desc: 15yr old Chuck returns home from school to find his mother, Betty Limbrick, shot dead on the floor. Evidence points to a robbery gone wrong, but Kenda uncovers a plot almost too shocking to believe.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Blood Sisters
programme.desc: The bullet-ridden bodies of two sisters are found in a suburban house that’s littered with mysterious clues. Joe Kenda learns that the two unassuming young mothers shared an explosive secret.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Victim Zero
programme.desc: A brawl erupts at a local bar ends with the shooting death of a army solider. To unravel the murder, Lt. Joe Kenda most infiltrate a revered military institution, and expose a dangerous vendetta.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: A Killer Always Rings Twice
programme.desc: When 22 year-old Micki Filmore is found raped and murder in her apartment, detective Kenda focuses his investigation on her activities the previous night.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Now Pronounce You Dead
programme.desc: Mother of 3 Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Joe Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed, revealing a killer no one ever expected.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Rains Down
programme.desc: Restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. Kenda must break through a web of lies to hunt down one of the most dangerous criminal masterminds he’s ever faced.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Fractured Glass
programme.desc: When affable ladies’ man Michael Tittemore is gunned down in the dead of night, Kenda first sets his sights on the roommates who were present during the murder.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: I Will Hunt You Down
programme.desc: When two escaped inmates surface in Colorado Springs, it’s up to Lt. Joe Kenda and his Fugitive Unit to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Stuck In A Coffin
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a five-alarm fire, first responders discover a lifeless body. When Kenda learns that the deadly blaze was no accident, he launches a manhunt.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: The Highway
programme.desc: One is dead and two are in critical condition, and it’s up to Kenda and Barry to find out why a gun battle occurred in a quaint family home.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: Neighbors are aghast when Ernestine Addison and her teen son Bobby are gunned down in cold blood. The case heats up when Kenda receives word that the killer’s murderous rampage isn’t over just yet.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lock the Door
programme.desc: Soon after the lifeless body of Charlie Tuttle was discovered behind a locked bedroom door, his death was ruled a suicide. But six months later, Kenda receives an unprompted confession .

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Officer Down
programme.desc: Sgt. Joe Kenda is faced with his worst nightmare when he learns a friend and fellow officer, Mark Dabling, has been killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Bad Moon Rising
programme.desc: The night before Halloween, a real-life nightmare unfolds when a young man is found clinging to life. The case takes a dark turn when Lt. Joe Kenda learns there is a second victim somewhere in the woods.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Standoff
programme.desc: A disabled man is killed on the job, but Kenda’s case hits a roadblock when forensic evidence is scrubbed from the scene.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Point of No Return
programme.desc: When a mysterious explosion rocks a sleepy suburb, it’s up to Kenda to ID a pile of charred remains and find the killer who triggered the blast.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Murder Bites
programme.desc: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. It isn’t until Lt. Joe Kenda rethinks the entire case that he realizes someone has been lying.

programme.desc: Hopp inn i en verden av legendarisk førskole med Nick jr. Club! Bli med Dora utforskeren, Blaze og monstermaskinene, Bubble Guppies og Shimmer and Shine på morsomme, lærerike og magiske reiser. Perfekt for små barn for endeløs underholdning!

programme.title: Pluto TV Juniorklubben

programme.title: The Hills: A Night At The Opera
programme.desc: Audrina tar Justin i å kysse en annen jente, og en endelig konfrontasjon rundt forholdet deres følger. Heidi sjokkeres av at Spencers søster starter en krangel med Lauren og Brody på en nattklubb.

programme.title: The Hills: Once a Player
programme.desc: Lauren mener at Brody er for mye av en playboy til at man bør ta ham alvorlig. Spencers søster forteller ham at Heidi i hemmelighet tviler på om de bør gifte seg.

programme.title: The Hills: When One Door Closes...
programme.desc: Lauren mottar noen spennende nyheter på Teen Vogue og Heidi trenger litt tid borte fra Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: Paris Changes Everything
programme.desc: Lauren får endelig dra til Paris, men drømmeturen blir nesten ødelagt da hun finner ut at Brody har funnet seg en ny. Spencer følger etter Heidi til Colorado for å vinne henne tilbake, men planen hans slår feil.

programme.title: The Hills: Back to L.A.
programme.desc: Whitney må velge mellom tryggheten i Teen Vogue og risikoen ved å forfølge en ny karriere. Lauren og Brody krangler om hans nye kjæreste, og Heidi tilpasser seg livet uten Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: An Unexpected Friend
programme.desc: Lauren får overraskende en venn når Spencers søster Stephanie blir med i hennes moteklasse. Whitney tror den nye jobben er drømmejobben, men en hektisk tur til New York minner henne på å være forsiktig med hva hun ønsker seg.

programme.title: The Hills: When Spencer Finds Out...
programme.desc: Lauren inviterer Stephanie i bursdagsselskapet sitt, men Heidi og Spencer sår tvil om Stephanies lojalitet. Spencer lanserer en plan for å vinne Heidi tilbake.

programme.title: The Hills: Just Be Careful...
programme.desc: Heidi prøver å bli venner med Audrina igjen, men Lauren har sine tvil om Heidis motiver. Whitney tilpasser seg den nye jobben, men oppdager fort at hun savner å jobbe med Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills: Girls' Night Out
programme.desc: Heidi digger singellivet, helt til hun blir sjalu når hun ser Spencer sammen med andre jenter. Whitney ber om Laurens hjelp ved Moteuken i LA, og åpner dermed nye dører for Lauren og hennes karriere.

programme.title: The Hills: A New Roommate
programme.desc: Med Spencer ute av bildet, prøver Heidi en siste gang å bli venner med Lauren igjen. Når Audrina begynner å være mer sammen med Heidi og Justin, spør Lauren seg selv om de egentlig bør fortsette å bo sammen.

programme.title: The Hills: A Date With The Past
programme.desc: En gammel flamme blusser opp når Stephen Coletti dukker opp igjen i Laurens liv. Heidi prøver å hindre Stephanie i å komme på Laurens innflytningsfest.

programme.title: The Hills: No Place Like Home
programme.desc: Lauren havner mellom to stoler når spenningen mellom Lo og Audrina stiger. Heidi bestemmer seg for at forholdet til Spencer er over, og aksepterer et jobbtilbud som fører henne til Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Hills: The Next Move Is Yours
programme.desc: I sesongfinalen føler Audrina seg utestengt av Laurens nære vennskap med Lo, og vurderer å flytte ut. Lauren gjør et inderlig forsøk på å reparere forholdet med Audrina, men det kan være for sent.

programme.title: The Hills: We'll Never Be Friends
programme.desc: Når sesong fire starter er situasjonen mellom Audrina og Lo anspent. Lauren forsøker å gjøre et godt inntrykk på en ny fyr, og et besøk fra Heidis søster Holly truer Spencer og Heidis forhold.

programme.title: The Hills: Drama Follows Them
programme.desc: Stephanie blir uvenner med broren sin og kompisen hans når Lauren møter på Spencer på bursdagen sin. Kelly Cutrone sparker noen på People's Revolution og Whitney fyller plassen. Laurens forhold med Doug kanskje går litt for fort fram.

programme.title: The Hills: Better Off As Friends
programme.desc: Lauren innser at kjemien hun hadde med Doug på videregående, ikke lenger er der. Whitney er nervøs for å dra til New York for jobben, men en date med en kjekk modell hjelper på humøret. Til tross for en fin gest vil Spencer bryte helt med Stephanie.

programme.title: The Hills: Boys Make Girls Cry
programme.desc: En heidundrende tur til Las Vegas går galt når Audrina ignorerer Lauren. Brody tar opp Stephanies fortid, og gutta ender opp i fengsel. Heidis søster Holly flytter inn, men det er lite Spencer heller vil enn å sparke henne ut.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Has To Change
programme.desc: Lauren og Audrina kjemper for å redde vennskapet sitt, men det kan allerede være for sent. Spencer har fått nok av Heidis søster Holly og tar saken i egne hender. Og Brody og Doug forlater fengslet med noe nytt å fortelle.

programme.title: The Hills: You Always Miss a Best Friend
programme.desc: Heidis søster Holly tar kontakt med Lauren, noe som tvinger både Lauren og Heidi til å revurdere hva som skjedde med vennskapet deres. Audrina og Justins forhold blir satt på prøve når hun jobber på en stor begivenhet for Epic Records.
programme.sub-title: You Always Miss a Best Friend

programme.title: The Hills: When Lauren's Away...
programme.desc: Når Lauren drar på ferie med familien, ting går galt i Los Angeles. Stephanie dater Doug bak Laurens rygg, og Audrina og Heidi blir venner.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Act Innocent
programme.desc: Sannheten om Stephanies forhold til Laurens eks Doug kommer til slutt fram når de alle møtes på Dougs poolparty. Heidis mor kommer overraskende på besøk til LA og havner i en konfrontasjon med Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: If She Never Met Spencer...
programme.desc: Lauren får et brev fra Heidi hvor hun beklager og innser at det er bare én ting som hindrer dem fra å bli venner igjen. Audrina starter å date en ny fyr for å gjøre Justin sjalu, men planen går feil.

programme.title: The Hills: Who To Choose?
programme.desc: Audrina møter sin gamle flamme Corey igjen og sjonglerer plutselig to gutter. Spencer tvinger Heidi til å sparke ut søsteren hennes Holly fra leiligheten.

programme.title: The Hills: You'll Never Have This
programme.desc: Lauren og Audrina reiser til Cabo for Brody bursdag, men når Justin blir sjalu av Audrinas nye forhold, blir festen en slåsskamp. Spencer ydmyker Stephanie etter å funnet ut at hennes nye kjæreste er venn med Brody.

programme.title: The Hills: I Want You To Be With Me
programme.desc: Lauren prøver å skape fred mellom Brody og Stephanie. Audrina ønsker å få ting til å fungere med Corey, men Justin vil ikke gi slipp på henne. Stephanie tviler på sin nye kjæreste etter at han bryter sitt løfte om å stå opp mot Brody.
programme.sub-title: I Want You To Be With Me

programme.title: The Hills: It's Her Move
programme.desc: Audrina får sitt eget sted, og håper at Justin vil flytte inn hos henne, men alle frykter at hun flytter av feil grunn. Heidi inviterer Spencer til et arrangement med jobben, og blir tatt i å ha litt for mye moro.

programme.title: The Hills: Back To New York
programme.desc: Whitney reiser til New York og den nye gutten Jay stjeler oppmerksomheten hennes. Heidi er nedfor etter å ha fått sparken, og da Spencer snakker med Brent for å få jobben hennes tilbake, gjør han bare situasjonen verre.

programme.title: The Hills: One Last Chance
programme.desc: Lauren lar Heidis søster sove over hos seg. Justin ber Audrina med på tur for en romantisk helg, og Heidis frustrasjon med Spencer vokser etter at hun må tigge for å få jobben tilbake.

programme.title: The Hills: You Did This
programme.desc: Audrina tror på et rykte hun hører: at Lauren har rotet med Justin. I mellomtiden prøver Holly å få Heidi bort fra Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills: It's About Trust
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å redde vennskapet med Lauren etter å ha anklaget henne for å rote med Justin. Spencer og Stephanie besøker bestemoren deres, som er lei av at de krangler.

programme.title: The Hills: Dream Boy, Dream Job
programme.desc: Whitney blir tilbudt drømmejobben i NYC og håper å få møte Jay der. Lauren blir nostalgisk da foreldrene selger huset i Laguna Beach, og Stephanie ber Spencer om hjelp da hun ikke klarer å bestemme seg for hva hun skal gjøre med Cameron.

programme.title: The Hills: Mr. & Mrs. Pratt
programme.desc: Spencer og Heidi ignorerer bekymringene til sine familier og stikker av til Mexico for å gifte seg. Whitney tar en sjanse på drømmejobben i New York City, og sier farvel til Lauren og sitt liv i Los Angeles.

programme.title: The Hills: I Heidi Take Thee Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren og Heidi møter på hverandre, og husker hvorfor de pleide å være venner. Spencer og Heidi har akkurat giftet seg da Heidis mor kommer til byen. Justin sjokkerer Audrina når han tar henne til Palm Springs for en overraskelse.

programme.title: The Hills: Don't Cry On Your Birthday
programme.desc: Når Heidi kommer til overraskelsesfesten på bursdagen til Lauren, gråter de to gamle vennene for vennskapet som har gått i oppløsning. Spencer starter en voldelig nevekamp når Cameron anklager ham for å ha plukket opp en bartender.

programme.title: The Hills: Everything Happens for a Reason
programme.desc: Spencers sjarm fører Heidi hjem til Colorado, der gjenopptar hun kontakten med en gammel flamme. Lauren forteller Stephanie hva hun syns om at Heidi kom i bursdagsselskapet. Spencer snakker med Brody igjen etter en lang tids taushet.

programme.title: The Hills: I'm Done With You
programme.desc: Etter at Heidi tar Spencer på fersken på en nattklubb med bartenderen Stacie, krever hun at de skal gå i parterapi. Lauren setter ryktet sitt på spill når hun skaffer Stephanie en praktikantplass hos People's Revolution.

programme.title: The Hills: Crazy In Love
programme.desc: Audrina forsøker å komme over Justin ved å kaste sitt blikk på Brody i stedet. Heidi sleper en motvillig Spencer til parterapi. Når Stephanie går i baret hos People's Revolution, truer Lauren med å sparke henne.

programme.title: The Hills: I Always Had A Little Crush
programme.desc: Når jentene krasjer guttenes Hawaii tur, prøver Valeria å glemme Justin ved å flørte med Brordy. Heidis ekskjæreste, som er jomfru, kommer på besøk og Heidi håper at Spenser skal lære noe av eksens verdier.
programme.sub-title: I Always Had A Little Crush

programme.title: The Hills: Playmates Bring the Drama
programme.desc: Audrina fortviler når Brodys kjæreste konfronterer henne med Hawaii, og Brody gjør ingenting for å stoppe det. Heidi oppdager en tekstmelding fra Stacie til Spencer og drar til nattklubben for å konfrontere henne med det.

programme.title: The Hills: Hi Lauren, It's Spencer
programme.desc: Lauren er usikker på om hun skal gå i Heidis bryllup etter at Spencer endelig har bedt om unnskyldning. Brody nekter å risikere forholdet sitt til Jayde for å redde vennskapet med Audrina, og Stephanie konfronterer Kelly Cutrone.

programme.title: The Hills: Something Old, Something New
programme.desc: I Laurens siste episode må hun bestemme om hun er villig til å tilgi Spencer for å kunne stille opp for Heidi i hennes "prinsesse"-bryllup. Hele besetningen dukker opp og blir overrasket over en gjest ingen tenkte ville komme.

programme.title: SvampeBob Firkant
programme.desc: Gratulerer med dagen! Vår kanalen har fått en 25 års logo får å feire bursdagen til vår kule favorite svamp! Her finner du eventyrene og bestrebelsene til SvampeBob Firkant og vennene hans i vann i den fiktive undervannsbyen Bikini Bunnen.
