programme.desc: A report on the death of colorful entrepreneur and Las Vegas gambler Gary Triano, who was blown up in his car after finishing a round of golf at the exclusive La Paloma Country Club in Tucson, Arizona in 1996.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending DJ
programme.desc: A report about Danroy "DJ" Henry and the dedication and struggles his family endured while trying to restore their son's reputation after he was shot dead in Pleasantville, New York, by police officer Aaron Hess in 2010.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: In September 2005, 17-year-old Taylor Behl, a Virginia Commonwealth University freshman, disappeared from campus. A police investigation eventually uncovered her association with Ben Fawley, a 38-year-old man who confessed to having sex with Taylor.

programme.title: 48 Hours: West Memphis 3: Free
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Joanne Witt was stabbed to death while she was sleeping on Thursday, June 11, 2009. One month prior to her death Joanne found her 14-year-old daughter Tylar Witt in a compromising situation with 19-year-old Stephen Colver.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery on Twin Peaks Drive
programme.desc: A report on the December 16, 1998 death of Ronda Reynolds, whose husband found her lifeless body with a gunshot wound to the head in her home on Twin Peaks Drive in Toledo, Washington.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Last Ride Home
programme.desc: An examination of the 2016 case of wealthy lawyer Tex McIver, who shot his wife Diane McIver from the backseat of a car while their friend drove them home.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: In 2003, Jeanne Callahan waited for her husband, Stephen Trantel, to return home from a day of fishing. Hours later, she received a call telling her that Stephen was under arrest -- police told Jeanne that Stephen had committed ten bank robberies.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Love and Death in Alaska - Part 1
programme.desc: On May 2, 1996, the body of Kent Leppink was found off a deserted road in Alaska. He had been shot three times. Police discovered that he had been involved with Mechele Hughes, a young woman who worked as a stripper in a club.
programme.sub-title: Love and Death in Alaska - Part 1

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Fenn Treasure
programme.desc: A report on the treasure hunt started by a rich art dealer and the lives lost in pursuit of it.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Preacher's Wife
programme.desc: In April 2006, Matt Baker, a pastor from Waco, Texas, returned home to find his wife Kari unconscious, with an empty bottle of Unisom and a suicide note beside her. Police ruled it a suicide. However, her family believed otherwise.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case of the Poison Cheesecake
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.
programme.sub-title: The Case of the Poison Cheesecake

programme.title: 48 Hours: Defending Your Life
programme.desc: For 17 years, Kim and Beth Jones have been trying to prove that their father, Jerry Jones, Jr. is innocent of the 1988 murder of their mother, Lee. Jones was found guilty, but in 1999, the court ordered him released due to an ineffective lawyer.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Secrets of Palm Beach
programme.desc: A report about the murder of Linda Fishman, a wealthy widow found murdered in her Florida home. The childless woman had always been known for her generosity and at first it was suspected that her nephew was responsible for the crime.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Brightin Ax Murder
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Live to Tell: "The Chowchilla Kidnapping"
programme.desc: 48 Hours is television's most popular true-crime series, investigating shocking cases and compelling real-life dramas with journalistic integrity and cutting-edge style.

programme.title: Danish Fight Night: København - Maj 2024
programme.desc: Se bl.a. Dina Thorslunds titelforsvar med en dobbelt VM-kamp ved Danish Fight Night i Royal Arena fra d. 25. maj 2024.
programme.sub-title: Danish Fight Night: København - Maj 2024 (Part 2) DA

programme.title: Danish Fight Night: København - Maj 2024
programme.desc: Se bl.a. Dina Thorslunds titelforsvar med en dobbelt VM-kamp ved Danish Fight Night i Royal Arena fra d. 25. maj 2024.
programme.sub-title: Danish Fight Night: København - Maj 2024 (Part 1) DA

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: Changes in Attitudes
programme.desc: Wes and Murph discuss how the sports world has changed since the original Greatest Sports Legends was filmed and compare past styles, interviews, and attitudes to those of the present.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: Quiz Show
programme.desc: Wes and Murph compete in the first ever Greatest Sports Legends Quiz Game, going head-to-head to see who knows more about the legends of the past and present.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: Tragedies
programme.desc: Wes and Murph discuss some of the unfortunate tragedies that have shaken the sports world to this day.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: The Intimidators
programme.desc: Wes and Murph discuss a group of intimidating athletes who instilled fear in all their competitors in order to come out on top.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: Baseball Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: Wes and Murph discuss the greatest teammate duos in baseball history.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: The Leaders
programme.desc: Wes and Murph discuss the greatest coaches in sports history and compare them to the coaches of present day.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: Trailblazers
programme.desc: Wes and Murph talk about trailblazers - athletes who have taken a stand against injustice no matter the cost to their careers.

programme.title: Greatest Sports Legends: Then and Now: Personal Rivalries
programme.desc: Wes and Murph discuss personal rivalries, both old and new, in a variety of different sports throughout history.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Croatia
programme.desc: ‘The Mountain’ Hafthor Julius Björnsson is back in Croatia, where some of Game of Thrones series is filmed. In the ancient city of Split, modern gladiators compete.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Poland
programme.desc: Half-way to the world grand finals in Malaysia, in the home country of current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski, watch competitors battle it out for the SCL and ’The Strongest Man in Poland’titles.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Austria
programme.desc: The home country of the current world champion – Martin Wildauer. In the mountains of Austria competitors face the truck pull, yoke race, deadlift, frame walk, and dumbbell.

programme.title: Manchester United - For the Glory
programme.desc: Manchester United are one of the most award winning teams in the sport, with over 650 million fans worldwide.

programme.title: Sports Legends, Hosted by Michael Jordan: Don Maynard
programme.desc: Host Michael Jordan interviews the legendary wide receiver Don Maynard.

programme.title: Sports Legends, Hosted by Michael Jordan: Rodger Staubach
programme.desc: Host Michael Jordan interviews Dallas Cowboy great Rodger Staubach.

programme.title: Sports Legends, Hosted by Michael Jordan: Nate Thurmond
programme.desc: Host Michael Jordan interviews defensive wizard Nate Thurmond.

programme.title: Sports Legends, Hosted by Michael Jordan: Al Unser
programme.desc: Host Michael Jordan interviews legendary race car driver Al Unser.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL Romania
programme.desc: In the home of Drakula, Transylvania, competitors battle for the SCL champion title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League: SCL World log lift championship, Lithuania
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League Log Lift World Championships form part of the sport expo organised by Zydrunas Savickas., Fourteen competitors aim to top the ‘Big Z’s’ record lifting three different weights over their head.
programme.sub-title: SCL World log lift championship, Lithuania

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Heir Apparent
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Diplomat
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Contender, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Contender, Pt. 2
programme.desc: Barney poses as a fighter making his comeback, who boxes his way to a title bout with Staczek (Robert Phillips) in the second half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Execution
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Play
programme.desc: With Phelps and Rollin as the leading men, the Impossible Missions Force stages an anti-American play which could prove to be a strong propaganda device for the enemy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Cardinal
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Elixir
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Exchange
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bargain
programme.desc: The former dictator of a Caribbean island is made to have hallucinatory visions in which he sees his ominous destiny as part of an ingenious plot designed by the Impossible Missions Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Mind of Stefan Miklos
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is pitted against the ingenious logic of an enemy agent (guest Steve Ihnat) as the IMF attempts to lead the agent through a maze of complicated clues in order to reach a false conclusion.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Freeze
programme.desc: Before a statute of limitations expires on a 10-million dollar robbery, the Impossible Missions Force must spring the suspect from prison and dupe him into leading police to the hiding place of the money.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Test Case
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force must end the murderous career of a bacteriologist working for the enemy, who has succeeded in developing a mutant strain of a deadly bacteria which could be used as a practical battlefield weapon.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The System
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) sets out to persuade the trusted henchman of a crime syndicate leader to testify against his boss.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Glass Cage
programme.desc: An electronically guarded prison confronts the Impossible Missions Force when it tries to free a political prisoner (Richard Garland) from an escape-proof glass cell.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Live Bait
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force invades the intricate world of spies to protect an American double agent and comes up against a human time bomb.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: Doomsday
programme.desc: When an unscrupulous manufacturer risks World War III by offering a hydrogen bomb for sale, the Impossible Missions Force enters the bidding with a dangerous plan to keep the weapon out of enemy hands.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible: The Bunker, Pt. 1
programme.desc: The IMF races a paid killer who is stalking a nuclear scientist forced by the enemy to work on a device that could upset the world power balance in the first of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Candy
programme.desc: Candy (Abbie Cornish) blir fascinert og tiltrukket av poeten Dan (Heath Ledger), som også er heroinmisbruker. Sammen beveger de seg ut på gyngende grunn, bundet sammen av deres bunnløse forelskelse og glupende seksuelle appetitt.

programme.title: Who Gets The Dog
programme.desc: Når Olive og Clay møttes var det kjærlighet ved første blikk, de giftet seg, kjøpte seg hus og adopterte en nyfødt valp - Wesley. Nå er det 6 år siden, og de har bestemt seg for å skille lag, og begge ønsker å ta sin elskede Wesley med seg.

programme.title: Road Less Traveled
programme.desc: Country-sangerinnen Charlotte vender tilbake til Tennessee før hun gifter seg. Når hun møter ungdomskjærligheten, blir noe levende og hun stiller spørsmål ved alt.

programme.title: Z for Zachariah
programme.desc: I etterkant av av en verdensomspennende atomkrig er Ann Burden (Margot Robbie) en overlevende. Ann frykter lenge at hun er det eneste gjenlevende mennesket på jorden, inntil hun oppdager noe helt forbløffende: et annen menneske.

programme.title: Lars and The Real Girl
programme.desc: Lars er en elskverdig introvert mann med emosjonell bagasje som har hindret ham i å si ja til livet. Etter år av ensomhet inviterer han Bianca, en venn han har møtt på Internett, til å møte ham. Han introduserer Bianca for sin bror og hans kone...

programme.title: About Us
programme.desc: Et ungt par ønsker å få kjærligheten tilbake og reiser til stedet der de tilbrakte bryllupsreisen åtte år tidligere. De kjemper sammen for å nå hverandre igjen. Det hele kulminerer i en hjerteskjærende finale når skjulte sannheter kommer for en dag.

programme.title: The Rewrite
programme.desc: Keith Michaels vant priser for manuset sitt til filmen "Paradise Misplaced". Men han holder på å bli vraket i Hollywood og blir derfor tvunget til å ta en jobb han hater for å få sitt gjennombrudd: Han må undervise.

programme.title: Modern Persuasion
programme.desc: En singel kvinne med fokus på karrieren i New York blir tvunget til å forholde seg til følgene av et mislykket forhold når ekskjæresten hennes hyrer inn hennes reklamebyrå.

programme.title: Odd Man Rush
programme.desc: Odd Man Rush er basert på Bill Keenans bestselgende, komiske selvbiografi af samme navn. Den amerikanske ishockeyspiller Bobby Sanders fra Harvard blir solgt til en div. 1. klubb i Sverige for en vaskemaskin.

programme.title: Frankie & Johnny
programme.desc: Pfeiffer spiller Frankie, en servitrise som jobber på en kaffebar i New York. Etter en rekke vonde forhold er en ny mann det siste Frankie ser etter... helt til en kommer og ser etter henne.
A man writing a book about the paranormal travels to New York and stays in a hotel room that has been said to be responsible for the death of all the guests that come to stay.

programme.title: Cabin Fever
programme.desc: Fem collegevenner drar til skogen for å drikke, feste og tulle rundt en helg. Men mens de sitter rundt leirbålet den første kvelden, dukker en eremitt gjennomvåt av blod opp.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Double Vision
programme.desc: Johnny's (Anthony Michael Hall) ability to alter fate is put to the test when he meets a young woman (Jennifer Finnigan) with psychic abilities of her own.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: From Agnes - With Love
programme.desc: A computer technician must deal with the queen of all femme fatales: a computer named Agnes who wreaks havoc on his love life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: You Drive
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, Oliver Pope accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Pope flees the scene, determined to hide his guilt, but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Execution
programme.desc: Just before being hanged for shooting a man in the back, a man in 1880 is transported into the year 1959 by a professor who soon realizes that he has brought forward a savage killer.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Uncle Simon
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Walking Distance
programme.desc: Martin Sloan, driving through the country, leaves his car and starts to walk toward his hometown, Homewood. He finds things exactly as they were when he was a child. He soon realizes he's gone back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Cavender is Coming
programme.desc: Cavender, an angel trying to win his wings, tries to help down-on-her-luck Agnes, who has just been fired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Still Valley
programme.desc: Confederacy scout Sgt. Joseph Paradine finds a town full of Union soldiers, and an old man who claims he used witchcraft to paralyze them.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Big Top
programme.desc: Johnny's visions inadvertently lead him to reexamine a ten-year-old murder case and his current relationship with his teenaged son, JJ.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Interred
programme.desc: When Johnny has disturbing visions of a man buried alive, he must overcome his differences with Sheriff Turner in the hopes of saving the man's life.

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Switch
programme.desc: After Johnny boards a train for some much-needed relaxation, he has a vision of a woman thrown to her death and soon falls for the intriguing beauty.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Midnight Sun
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: What's in the Box
programme.desc: A cheating husband sees his secret revealed and its horrible consequences on his just-repaired TV set.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Encounter
programme.desc: A World War II veteran and a Japanese-American gardener battle each other over a war that ended more than 20 years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trouble with Templeton
programme.desc: A nostalgic actor revisits his late wife and friends at their old haunt, only to find that he is now out of place there.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Old Ben, who is able to transform himself into anything, tries to help a crippled little girl.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Grave
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dust
programme.desc: In a tragic, western town, a desperate father begs for clemency as his son is slated to die for an accident he could not have prevented.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A World of Difference
programme.desc: Businessman Arthur Curtis discovers that life as he knows it doesn't really exist.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Stop at Willoughby
programme.desc: Riding home on the train one day, a man falls asleep and dreams it is 1880, and he is entering a small town called Willoughby.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Quality of Mercy
programme.desc: A gung-ho young soldier gets a new viewpoint on war when he inexplicably changes places with a Japanese officer trying to stop his superior from leading a charge against American forces.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Long Morrow
programme.desc: Before leaving on his mission, an astronaut meets a woman. They fall in love...

programme.title: The Dead Zone: Deja Voodoo
programme.desc: Johnny meets a beautiful woman (Reiko Aylesworth) in danger and is reminded again of the potentially dire consequences of even the smallest of choices.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You
programme.desc: Akkurat i det teamet gjør fremskritt mot hackerne som kontrollerer amerikanske krigsskip, får de vite at en amerikansk atomubåt også er blitt hacket.
programme.sub-title: It Isn't the Fall That Kills You

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Når Walter ved et uhell blir skutt ut i verdensrommet i en rakett, hallusinerer han om Paige mens oksygenet hans går tom, og Team Scorpion jobber febrilsk for å finne en måte å få ham hjem før han blir kvalt.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Little Boy Lost
programme.desc: Teamet må finne en gutt fra Ralphs klasse som forsvinner på en ekskursjon etter å ha støtt på en dødelig forbryter.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Bat Poop Crazy
programme.desc: Team Scorpions enkle jobb ved Natural History Museum i Los Angeles blir dødelig når de oppdager tyver som raner en utstilling med sjeldne edelstener for å berike en atombombe.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote
programme.desc: Før Halloween må teamet infiltrere et dypt, enormt hulesystem for å hindre en flaggermusbestand i å ødelegge det nordamerikanske økosystemet.
programme.sub-title: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Vote

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sly and the Family Stone
programme.desc: På valgdagen, når demokratiet står på spill, blir Team Scorpion kalt inn når noen prøver å skape kaos i det amerikanske presidentvalget.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Mother Load
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion reiser til Irland for Megans ettårsjubileum, oppdager Walter at en naturkatastrofe i en innsjø i nærheten har skapt en giftig sky som kan drepe alle i landsbyen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: This Is the Pits
programme.desc: Paiges mor verver Team Scorpion når hun ved et uhell oppdager en glemt atomreaktor i ferd med å eksplodere.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Walter må svømme gjennom de dødelige La Brea-tjæregropene mens teamet hjelper en kvinne som sitter fast i tjæren før hun går tom for oksygen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Wreck the Halls
programme.desc: Det er julaften og Team Scorpions elektronikkfrie ferie på fjellet blir dødelig når de støter på våpensmuglere og Ralph blir kidnappet mens de prøver å rømme.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Ice Ca-Cabes
programme.desc: Når et oppdrag i ørkenen resulterer i eksploderende splinter som skader Cabe alvorlig, må Team Scorpion fryse kroppen for å redde livet hans.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Når Team Scorpion blir lurt til å produsere falske penger for en utenlandsk enhet som ønsker å ødelegge den amerikanske økonomien, må Paige stole på moren Veronicas ferdigheter som svindler for å redde dem.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: The Hole Truth
programme.desc: Teamet må redde en mann på kanten av et enormt synkehull som truer med å ødelegge Los Angeles vannforsyning for alltid.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Sharknerdo
programme.desc: Team Scorpions jobb med å finne sunkne skatter går galt når Walter og Paiges båt eksploderer, og etterlater dem fortapt midt i Stillehavet omgitt av haier.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Keep It in Check, Mate
programme.desc: Walter og Sylvester deltar undercover i en internasjonal sjakkkturnering på fremmed jord for Team Scorpion for å ta ut en amerikansk spion før identiteten hennes avsløres.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Dirty Seeds, Done Dirt Cheap
programme.desc: Når et enkelt oppdrag for å beskytte en viktig frøbank går galt, må Team Scorpion redde Happy, Sylvester og Cabe, som begynner å lide av livstruende, fryktbaserte hallusinasjoner.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Don't Burst My Bubble
programme.desc: Etter en kraftig storm, sitter Happys venn Ada, som lever i en steril boble for å beskytte sitt kompromitterte immunsystem, igjen med farlig avfall i ferd med å punktere strukturen.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Monkey See, Monkey Poo
programme.desc: For å stoppe et farlig virus fra å spre seg, må Team Scorpion finne en sjelden truet ape i Amazonas som har antistoffet for kuren.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Broken Wind
programme.desc: Under et oppdrag for å reparere en turbin ved en vindpark, må Team Scorpion skynde seg for å redde Paige og Happy før kabelen som holder gondolen de er i, går i stykker.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Rock Block
programme.desc: Team Scorpion må trosse ordre fra en utenlandsk regjering når de henter en asteroide fra verdensrommet som inneholder DNA-tråder som kan få dødelige konsekvenser hvis de blir utsatt for luft.

programme.title: Scorpion NO: Strife on Mars
programme.desc: Team Scorpion blir sittende fast i en kollapsende og farlig biodom beregnet på Mars mens de prøver å få et par forskere ut.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 505
programme.desc: Ulla og Kristian bor i en vakker herskapsleilighet på Frederiksberg med sine to barn. Men de vil ha mer plass i et barnevennlig nabolag, innom sykkelavstand fra sentrum. Kan Tobias Edlev-Nielsen finne et hus til dem?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: En liten leiebolig i Vanløse og to små barn - ikke den beste kombinasjonen. Lisa og Erling drømmer om et stort hus med en stor hage. Tobias må jobbe hardt, da drømmene er mye større enn budsjettet.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Kristian drømmer om en diger garasje, og Nathja vil heller bli i Køge – kan Tobias oppfylle drømmene sine?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark
programme.desc: Maja og Kenneth bor på Vestjylland og drømmer om å komme nærmere familien til Maja i Silkeborg. Men budsjettet deres krever at de går på akkord med beliggenheten og ser i de nærliggende små byene.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 603
programme.desc: I Ikast er Camilla og Marc sultne på et hus med plass til oppbevaring. Men når Tobias finner et stort hus til dem, mister de motet, da det nå er SÅ mange rom som må pusses opp...

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 604
programme.desc: Stine og Daniel lengter etter mer plass før de snart utvider familien fra tre til fire. Derfor er det ikke optimalt når Mads ringer og forteller at avtalen med det nye huset deres i Langå ikke gjelder.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 301
programme.desc: Astrid og Steffen skal kjøpe sitt første hus, men de kan ikke gå på kompromiss med ønskene sine. De møter programmets eksperter som skal kjøpe et hus på deres vegne.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 302
programme.desc: Louise og Michael har vokst ut av sin lille leilighet i Århus og trenger mer plass. Paret gjør et kompromiss, og Louise står overfor sitt største mareritt i huset som ekspertene kjøper til dem.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 303
programme.desc: Charlotte og Mikkel bor i en så liten leilighet at dusjen må tømmes for ting hver gang de skal bade. Men nå ønsker de å flytte litt ut av byen sammen med sønnen deres.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 304
programme.desc: Pernille og Nicklas fra Odense bor så lite at hvis de trenger litt privatliv, så har de bare toalettet å ty til. Nicklas drømmer om å få et kjøkken med to ovner, slik at han kan lage mer mat.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 305
programme.desc: Wendy og Jesper fra Kalundborg bor allerede bra, i en leilighet som har en utrolig utsikt. Men en kommende familieforøkelse betyr at de må finne noe som er større.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 306
programme.desc: Jonas og Louise får sjokk når de ser hvilke hus de har råd til. Mads Mikkelsen og Tobias Edlev Nielsen jobber overtid for å prøve å oppfylle parets ønsker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 307
programme.desc: Mads og Mia ønsker å flytte litt utenfor byen - men ikke helt på landet. Med Tobias og Mads sin hjelp kjøper de en bolig som har nøyaktig alt de ikke liker.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: I første episode møter vi Tine og Lars, som har svimlende åtte millioner å kjøpe hus og pusse opp for. Men det store budsjettet har ikke hjulpet dem så langt - kan ekspertene være til hjelp?

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Ekspertene drar til Hørning, der presten og hennes familie trenger et nytt sted å bo. De leier et lite rekkehus og nå vil de gjerne flytte.

programme.title: Boligkjøp i blinde Danmark: Episode 404
programme.desc: Ida og Rasmus drømmer om å bytte ut sine lille leiebolig på Nørrebro med en murervilla i Hillerød. Men de angrer bittert på at de har spurt ekspertene om hjelp når de får se huset pengene gikk til.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Nynäshamn
programme.desc: Sunny Nynäshamn is a resort town close to Stockholm, but there is more here than the sea. Tareq meets a prize-winning chocolate maker using ingredients from her garden, visits a thriving local food market, and gets a lesson in how to smoke fish.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Røros
programme.desc: Born as a mining town in the 17th century, Røros is now a center for local and organic food producers. Tareq tries dairy products which Michelin-starred chefs swear by, goes skiing and sledding around Røros many hilly streets

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Vimmerby
programme.desc: Vimmerby is known as the birthplace of beloved author Astrid Lindgren. Tareq finds that the area is also well-regarded for its cuisine. From the children’s theme park to the friendly moose that roam the hills, Vimmerby has a lot to offer visitors.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Trysil
programme.desc: The mountains and snowfall in Trysil mean that the town has to be creative with food; Tareq learns how to make cheese in the traditional way, and goes skiing of course, and takes to the slopes to cook something as skiers pass by.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Värmland
programme.desc: Värmland is home to many of Sweden’s most famous authors and inventors. However, it is also a place with a rich food culture. Tareq gets his hands on a very rare bird to cook and also takes time out to float down a tranquil river on a wooden raft.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Fyn
programme.desc: Tareq visits Fyn, the fairy tale capital of the world. Famous as the birthplace of Hans Christian Andersen, Fyn is also known as the garden of Denmark. Here we explore stunning nature and world class cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Höga Kusten
programme.desc: Created thousands of years ago, the High Coast in the northern part of Sweden is the highest coast in the world. Tareq sets out to sample one of the most extreme types of Swedish food, fermented herring.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Denmark
programme.desc: North Jutland has a rich culinary history. The unique conditions have created equally unique products. Tareq meets local food entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever changing environment and putting this region on the culinary map.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Uppsala
programme.desc: Uppsala is the city of knowledge: home to the oldest university in Scandinavia. It’s a wonderful agricultural area surrounded by fertile flatlands. Tareq discovers the historical treasures of Uppsala and its thriving culinary life.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: North Sealand
programme.desc: North Zealand has been a playground of the rich and famous since the fifteenth century. Tareq learns how this beautiful north eastern part of Denmark is the perfect place to go foraging for wild berries and herbs.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Åre
programme.desc: Sweden’s largest ski resort Åre is well known for its local ingredients, boasting the highest number of organic food producers per capita in Sweden. The fresh water and clean air create unique conditions for growing excellent food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: The Danish Lakelands
programme.desc: The Danish Lakelands produce some of the finest ingredients that you can find. Tareq has a go at an old cooking technique from New Zealand called Hangi - using heated rocks buried in a pit oven.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Gothenburg on the west coast of Sweden has recently been discovered as an exciting destination by both international travel journalists and food bloggers. Tareq tracks down an old army barracks which has been converted into a world class cheese factory.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Luleå
programme.desc: Tareq visits Luleå, home to the beautiful Tree Hotel: a collection of treehouses built by an award winning architect. Following the river further up into the mountains he reaches the land where, for centuries, the Sami people kept their reindeer herds.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Halmstad
programme.desc: In Halmstad Tareq explores the contrast between the busy summer scene at the beach and the quiet rural country life, meeting Jörgen Persson: award winning table tennis player and visiting a village famous for its cheese.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Kemi
programme.desc: Kemi is situated in northern Finland by the Bothnian Bay and it is part of Lapland region. Tareq tries his luck at a spot of burbot fishing on the frozen sea and visits the snow castle hotel.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: West Sweden
programme.desc: Situated on the west coast of Sweden, Bohuslän is a place where you can really feel the history of fishing all around a tradition that is still active. Tareq will be harvesting supreme quality oysters and lobsters and cook some wonderful seafood dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Florø
programme.desc: Tareq visits Norway and Florø to celebrate their national day -17th of May. Surrounded by breathtaking archipelagos and stunning fjords he dives for scallops in the north sea, cooking at mountain peaks and exploring the history of norwegian salmon

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia
programme.desc: Tareq makes his way across the baltic sea to Estonia and the capital Tallinn. He discovers the historical treasures of the city and its thriving culinary life before he heads out into the vast and beautiful countryside and the national park of Soomaa.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Ringkøbing
programme.desc: Ringkøbing, a lovely old market town located at the west coast of Denmark. Here, Tareq visit a traditional Herring Festival and meets up with local entrepreneurs who have learned to adapt to this ever-changing environment.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Falkenberg
programme.desc: Something is definitely happening in Falkenberg on the west coast of Sweden. Over the last couple of years it have become somewhat of a haven for foodies. Tareq is on a mission; taking him through a fertile landscape with vineyards and salmon fishing.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Estonia (Part 2)
programme.desc: Estonia has embarked on a journey greatly inspired by the nordic cuisine. Tareq explores the countryside of Estonia before he returns to the capital of Tallinn where he meets people that really love their traditional food.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Öland
programme.desc: Tareq bikes through the unique landscape of Öland, Sweden's second largest island located in the Baltic Sea. It is a place where the interaction between man and nature have created a diverse and rich farmland with an amazing amount of small producers.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Bornholm
programme.desc: Bornholm, the sunny bright green island with it’s own gastronomic tone is a true pioneer when it comes to local food at it’s finest quality. Tareq visit Denmark's first regional food culture house where they develop this unique flourishing cuisine.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Laponia
programme.desc: In the northern part of Sweden, you’ll find the stunning world heritage Laponia. Almost 10.000 square kilometres of nature reserves and national parks. Tareq visit the rich, unique culture of the sami in the vast impressive wilderness.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Malmö & Copenhagen
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor returns to his home turf to see what has happened and what the future might bring to the new nordic cuisine. He visits a local goat farmer and meets up with young enthusiastic chefs who takes this nordic legacy further.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Zealand
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor visits the South Coast of Denmark to make his own versions of open-faced sandwiches and smoked fish dishes.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Dalsland
programme.desc: Tareq Taylor puts on his hiking boots and explores the pilgrim trail of Dalsland in West Sweden. This episode will include outdoor cooking, foraging and beaver safari.

programme.title: Tareq Taylor's Nordic Cookery NO: Stockholm
programme.desc: When Tareq arrives in Stockholm he will meet innovation and world class gastronomy, a big city for foodies. He will make some pizza at the Rosendal garden café and go on an adventure in the archipielago.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team must protect high-profile activist Benjamin Polk at a political rally, but it soon becomes a manhunt when they search for a sniper trying to kill Polk. Also, Charlie awaits an answer from Amita, on the sixth season premiere.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When two FBI agents, part of a unit headed by Don's former mentor, are killed during a shootout with bank robbers, the team must investigate what exactly happened. Also, Charlie and Amita worry when Larry opts not to attend a conference in Geneva.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and his team are called in to investigate who is behind a deadly gambling ring that is running a high-stakes Russian roulette tournament. Also, Don and Charlie become concerned about Alan's financial health.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a geneticist's daughter who they suspect was abducted by her unstable mother but become more concerned when they think the young girl may be a clone. Also, Charlie and Amita talk about having kids and Liz reveals a dark secret.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When strange, almost paranormal happenings are observed at a decommissioned air base, the spooky occurrences take on a decidedly different tone when the team is brought in to investigate the mystery of a dead woman found there.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team conducts an undercover sting to locate a cyber crime lord, but the operation is foiled by a charming, brilliant hacker whose desire to take over the online black markets puts him in a dangerous online turf war that could lead to murder.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: While tracking down a felon running a heroin ring inside a prison, Agent Ian Edgerton becomes a murder suspect when the informant he meets with ends up dead, sending a desperate Edgerton over the edge when he takes a member of Don's team hostage.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When robbers hit a diamond exchange and take hostages, Don and the team find an unlikely ally in convict John Buckley, who may help the team's investigation when they believe the men are copying Buckley's criminal strategies.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: When the team foils a robbery of an armored car full of Federal Reserve money and recover bills that trace back to the infamous D.B. Cooper heist, they call on Agent Roger Bloom, who worked on the Cooper case, for help with the investigation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Don and the team try their luck at investigating the theft of scratch-off lottery tickets, but the stakes are raised when one of the culprits killed at a botched robbery turns out to be a former lottery winner.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a lost shipment of high-caliber firearms when one of the weapons is responsible for random killings throughout the city. Also, Charlie and Amita disagree on a wedding date while Don re-evaluates his relationship with Robin.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team searches for a serial killer who is targeting men who solicit prostitutes. Also, Colby and Nikki deal with the aftermath of a car crash when they have an accident during the investigation.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team gets a taste of the limelight when they search for jewels worth millions that have been stolen during an awards show broadcast. Also, Don revisits an old case that is haunting him, and Larry returns from his adventure in the desert.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: The team investigates the deaths of two men who were part of a group of friends that had been sexually assaulted by a teacher when they were young boys.

programme.title: Numb3rs
programme.desc: Charlie and Amita get married and begin preparations for their London adventure, but they put a slight hold on their plans when they assist Don to track down the whereabouts of his gun after it goes missing, on the sixth season finale.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Pilot
programme.desc: I premiereepisoden prøver Don å fakke en serievoldtektsmann som har begynt å drepe ofrene sine. Don rekrutterer Charlie for å hjelpe til med å spore opp morderen.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Sabotasje
programme.desc: Mens de etterforsker en godstogulykke med dødelig utfall, avslører Don og Charlie en sjokkerende gjerningsperson som er ute etter å redusere publikums tillit til jernbanesystemet.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Vektor
programme.desc: Da folk i Los Angeles dør på mystisk vis, blir Don og FBI-teamet kalt inn av Folkehelseinstituttet for å finne ut om det er biologisk terror. De prøver å spore opp viruset ved hjelp av Charlies kjennskap til sykdomsmatematikk.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Usikkerhetsprinsipp
programme.desc: Da Don og teamet prøver å fakke et par bankranere i Los Angeles, lager Charlie en ligning ved hjelp av sannsynlighet og statistisk analyse for å finne ut hvor det neste ranet vil finne sted.

programme.title: Numb3rs: Strukturell korrupsjon
programme.desc: Etter at en ingeniørstudent ved CalSci blir funnet død etter et mistenkt selvmord, overtaler Charlie Don til å sette i gang en etterforskning etter å ha lest studentens avhandling, hvor han hevder at det arkitekturisk flotte Cole Center er strukturelt ust

programme.title: Tokyo Fist
programme.desc: Forretningsmannen Tsuda møter barndomsvennen Tajuki, som er blitt semiprofesjonell bokser. Tsuda mistenker snart at hans forlovede er utro med Tajuki, og etter en krangel trener han hardt til en voldsom og blodig konfrontasjon.

programme.title: Drunken Tai Chi
programme.desc: This film follows the ups and downs of Cheng Do as he stumbles his way through his journey to avenge the assassination of his father and brother.

programme.title: Ghost In The Shell
programme.desc: I år 2029 er en kvinnelig kyberagent på sporet av "Dukkemesteren" – et datavirus som kan invadere kybernetiske hjerner og endre offerets minner.

programme.title: Welcome to Collinwood
programme.desc: Cosimo får en plan for en kjempejobb av sin cellekamerat. Han ber kvinnen sin om å finne en patsy for tyveriet av bilen hans, og tilbyr 15 000 dollar. Plutselig er 7 involvert.

programme.title: The Lodger: A Story of the London Fog
programme.desc: En huseier mistenker at den nye losjeren hennes er galningen som dreper kvinner i London.

programme.title: The War Of The Worlds
programme.desc: Gene Barry og Ann Robinson er blant menneskene som blir fascinert når en meteorlignende gjenstand faller ned ... men passasjerene er definitivt ikke vennligsinnede.

programme.title: Murder!
programme.desc: En jurymedlem i en mordrettssak stemmer for å dømme, mens de andre jurymedlemmene har andre tanker og begynner å etterforske på egenhånd før henrettelsen.

programme.title: Meatballs

programme.title: Hercules in New York
programme.desc: Bannlyst fra Olympus, blir Hercules (Arnold Schwarzenegger) sendt til Jorden, hvor han finner ekte kjærlighet og starter en lysende karriere som kroppsbygger.

programme.desc: Ett blikk, og du vet at de er fra et veldig rart sted. De er fra New Jersey, via "Frankrike", via Remulak langt ute på viddene. De er Coneheads.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woodys kjærestes mor, en vakker, eldre kvinne, gjør seksuelle fremskritt mot ham.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Frasier er opprørt når Liliths nye bok betegner ham som en kjedelig, pålitelig "godgutt"

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Rebeccas planer for en romantisk dag med Robin blir ødelagt når han velger å tilbringe dagen med å konkurrere mot Sam.
programme.sub-title: Indoor Fun with Sammy and Robby

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla får stor skyldfølelse når hun skjuler pengene fra sin avdøde manns eiendom for den andre enken.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Sam, Cliff og Norm ydmyker seg selv når de feilaktig tror at rivalene deres på en annen bar har gjort Cheers til mål for enda en narrestrek.
programme.sub-title: Bar Wars III: The Return of Tecumseh

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Woody gir Kelly en løftering når faren ordner en tur til Europa for henne.

programme.title: Cheers NO
programme.desc: Carla frykter at Eddies ånd hjemsøker henne når hun bestemmer seg for å begynne å date igjen.

programme.title: Cops: Mohawked Cleaning Service
programme.desc: A suspect resisting arrest draws a crowd, a homeless man decides to camp out in someone's house while they're in the hospital and a traffic stop results in a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: The Runaways
programme.desc: A driver pursued by police bails from her moving vehicle, a jaywalker decides to run from officers, and a patrol encounters a little boy who decided to run away from home.

programme.title: Cops: Perfume Takedown
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: Cops: Put Your Clothes Back On
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: Cops: Tazed and Confused
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: Cops: Cruisin' the Neighborhood
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: Cops: Step Away from the Cutlery
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: Cops: Love Bites
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: Cops: Running in Traffic
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: Cops: Taser Proof
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: Cops: You'll Shoot Your Eye Out
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: Cops: I'll Raise My Voice Right Back!
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.
programme.sub-title: I'll Raise My Voice Right Back!

programme.title: Cops: We Know Who You Are
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: Cops: Lady Bit My Finger
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: Cops: Familiar Faces
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: Cops: Facebook Fury
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: Cops: Without a Paddle
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: Cops: Crash Landing
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops: The One Dollar Shoe
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: Cops: Getting Funcky
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: Cops: Hit and Run
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: Cops: Be Careful What You Ask For
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.
programme.sub-title: Be Careful What You Ask For

programme.title: Cops: Cats and Dogs
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: Cops: Sittin' in the Dark
programme.desc: A suspect seen fleeing a vehicle refuses to admit he was ever in said vehicle, and police respond to a call that shots were fired.

programme.title: Cops: The Blame Game
programme.desc: An arrested man has a long list of instructions for his "bae," and a driver charged with heroin possession claims he was framed by the passenger in his backseat.

programme.title: Cops: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A recently released convict leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen vehicle, and officers respond to a report of a man pulling a knife on his brother.

programme.title: Cops: That's My Grill
programme.desc: A son fights his mom and responding officers, a man tells police the wad of weed in his mouth is not his, and a pack of cigarillos is the root of a domestic dispute.

programme.title: Cops: Drive and Dash
programme.desc: After deputies pursue a car-theft suspect to his home, he tries to convince them he has been there all along, and a man violates a protection order to try to reconcile with his wife.

programme.title: Cops: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Carjacking victims flag down officers whom then locate, pursue and acquire the stolen vehicle, and a man admits to officers the car he's driving is stolen.

programme.title: Cops: Pinky Promise
programme.desc: An officer finds a woman asleep at the wheel in the middle of a highway, deputies investigate a possible kidnapping, and a nervous driver just wants to be honest with police.

programme.title: Cops: Dead End Dash
programme.desc: An officer tracks a suspect down a treacherous cliffside, a man puts his brother and elderly father at risk, and a man asks police to take his son to jail.

programme.title: Cops: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire
programme.desc: A suspected car thief's claims of innocence are undermined by a video he shot of himself earlier that day, and the pursuit of a suspected drunk driver has a surprising end.
programme.sub-title: Four Felonies and a Flat Tire

programme.title: Cops: Pants Party
programme.desc: A car eludes a DUI checkpoint only to crash, one woman takes the fall for everyone in her group, and a man hides his stash in the one place he thinks police will never look.

programme.title: Cops: Smooth Move
programme.desc: A shifty suspect claims he wasn't the driver of a wrecked vehicle police were pursuing, and a detained cyclist attempts a tricky maneuver to rid himself of damning evidence.

programme.title: Cops: Highway to Jail
programme.desc: Reckless ATV drivers lead police on a dangerous chase through the streets of Atlanta, and a man worried about warrants lies about his identity to police during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops: Dishonest Dudes
programme.desc: Torrential rain hampers the pursuit of a fleeing vehicle, a man on a moped is carrying more than he lets on, and a persistent police officer unravels a sketchy man's story.

programme.title: Cops: Fighting to Lose
programme.desc: Shots fired in a park after hours leads to a messy situation for one officer, and a disturbed man with a gun takes responding officers on a harrowing chase.

programme.title: Cops: Mom Still Loves You
programme.desc: Officers track down a suspect who eluded them earlier, a suspicious vehicle takes off at the sight of police, and a man gets busted for possession in front of his mom.

programme.title: Cops: The Young and the Reckless
programme.desc: Police catch up to a man with warrants and a history of resisting arrest, a fidgety driver arouses suspicion, and a minor with beers in his pants has to answer to his mom.

programme.title: Star Trek II: The Wrath of Khan
programme.desc: Det er 2200-tallet. Føderasjonens U.S.S. Enterprise er på et treningsoppdrag og det virker som om admiral James T. Kirk (William Shatner) er resignert på at inspeksjonen kan bli den siste romferden i sin karriere. Men Khan er tilbake.

programme.title: Star Trek 3 - Jakten På Spock
programme.desc: Admiral Kirks seier over Khan og dannelsen av Genesis-planeten er tomme seiere. Spock er død og McCoy drives uforklarlig mot galskap. Så gir et overraskelsesbesøk fra Sarek, Spocks far, en forbløffende avsløring.

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: Mannskapet på Federation-skipet Enterprise tilkalles til Nimbus III, Planeten for intergalaktisk fred. De skal forhandle over en bortføring, men får vite at kidnapperen er en slektning av Spock.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Etter årevis med krig, nærmer Federation og Klingon-imperiet seg en fredssamling når et Klingon-skip nesten blir ødelagt i et tilsynelatende angrep fra Enterprise. Begge verdener forbereder seg på det som kan bli deres dødeligste møte så langt.

programme.title: Star Trek VII: Generations
programme.desc: Picards eneste håp for fremtiden er Nexus... og en legendarisk kaptein fra fortiden.

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: Etter en episk kamp mot borgene (cybernetisk forsterkede livsformer), følger kaptein Picard og hans besetning borgene tilbake til 2000-tallet for å hindre at de endrer jordens tidslinje og den første utenomjordiske kontakten.

programme.title: Star Trek IX: Insurrection
programme.desc: Når mannskapet på Enterprise får vite om føderasjonens plott mot innbyggerne av en unik planet, starter kaptein Picard et åpent opprør.

programme.title: Star Trek: Nemesis
programme.desc: Sett kursen mot en galakse med enestående action og eventyr når kaptein Jean-Luc Picard (Patrick Stewart) og hans Starship-mannskap kjempet mot en farlig motstander... Som har en overraskende kobling til Picard!

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Priscillia Ciatti Case
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and –an extra sordid detail – a devil mask is found next to her body.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case
programme.desc: On March 28th 2013, the burnt body of Anne Barbot, 38 years old, is discovered in a forest of Maine-et-Loire.
programme.sub-title: Murdered For a Fake Treasure - Troadec Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake
programme.desc: On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows?
programme.sub-title: (Ruth Légeret Case) Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Willy Pomonti Case
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)
programme.desc: On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed.
programme.sub-title: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Adeline Piet Case
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! What has happened to Adeline Piet?

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)
programme.desc: On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato.
programme.sub-title: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: A Dire Deception (Laurence Maille Case)
programme.desc: On November 28, 2007, Laurence Maille disappeared. It was her partner, John Zablevski, who alerted the Vimy police in Pas-de-Calais. He explained that the young woman had left in the morning for a walk with their dog and never returned.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case
programme.desc: On February 27, 2015, in Toulouse, the parents of 19-year-old Maureen Jacquier discover their daughter stabbed several times in her bed.
programme.sub-title: Stabed In Her Bed: The Maureen Jaquier Case

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair
programme.desc: On December 20, 2012, in Val d'Izé (Ille-et-Vilaine), Aurélie Barbot, 29, was killed on her doorstep with a bullet to the head.
programme.sub-title: Shot At Point-Blank: The Aurelie Barbot Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)
programme.desc: Marc Van Beers, a 36-year old Brussels tax lawyer, dies in a road accident while on honeymoon. His wife Aurore is unharmed by the accident.
programme.sub-title: Crime Scene Solvers: Honeymoon Killers (Van Beers Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: The Laurence Dromard Case
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want her dead.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair
programme.desc: On July 8, 2002, near Amiens, a farmer discovers the lifeless body of a young woman, Patricia Leclercq, on his field.
programme.sub-title: Two Young Women Massacred: The Leconte Affair

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)
programme.desc: On the night of July 16, 2000, the life of Edwige Alessandri changed forever. She made a frantic emergency call in the town of Carpentras. She recounted that some men burst into her room and shot her husband while he slept.
programme.sub-title: Shot In the While Sleeping (Richard Alessandri Case)

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Josiane Bézard Case
programme.desc: On the morning of January 9th 2014, Josiane Bézard, 53 years old, drives her son to the Manosque's train station, and then vanishes.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers: Julein Thevenet Case
programme.desc: On January 27th 2014, in Somme-Suippe in the Marne, Sophie Thevenet discovers her dead husband's body in the garage.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 610
programme.desc: Sportsgale Jeanette ble inspirert for 12 år siden av en trend i treningsstudioet, hvor vennene hennes fikk forstørret brystene. I motsetning til venninnene liker hun ikke de nye, store puppene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 506
programme.desc: I 2010 fikk Birthe satt inn saltvannsimplantater i stedet for de vanlige silikonimplantatene. 5 år senere våkner hun til et skremmende syn - det ene implantatet hennes er borte.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 605
programme.desc: Når Annika ble 30 år, fikk hun penger til en skjønnhetsoperasjon av mannen sin. Paret reiser sammen til Litauen, men allerede på operasjonsdagen oppdager Annika at den litauiske kirurgen ikke gjorde det de hadde avtalt.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 702
programme.desc: Jeanett bryster henger etter at hun har født to barn, og hun bestemmer seg for å ta et brystløft og implantater. Men operasjonen blir en skuffelse for Jeanett.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 801
programme.desc: For 25 år siden var Susanne involvert i en voldsom trafikkulykke som vansiret ansiktet hennes. Siden ulykken har hun vært gjennom mer enn ti operasjoner, men føler likevel at hun ser ut som et monster.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 611
programme.desc: Etter å ha ammet over en lenger periode får Pernille slappe bryster, og hun velger derfor å ta en brystforstørrelsesoperasjon. Men i dag er hun så lei seg over resultatet.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 804
programme.desc: Allerede i en alder av 15 år bestemmer Caroline seg for at hun vil bruke sparepengene sine på nye bryster så snart hun fyller 18. Men høyre bryst begynte å henge, og brystene hennes ble ulike.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 206
programme.desc: Louise brukte familiens penger på en brystoperasjon som ble en traumatisk opplevelse for henne. Camilla er flau over brystvortene sine, og Jeanette lever i frykt for at implantatene er giftige.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter to svangerskap er Jeannette lei av strekkmerkene på magen. Lokalpolitiker Karina satt igjen med to bryster uten fylde, etter å ha ammet sine to barn.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 612
programme.desc: Etter et stort vekttap har 25 år gamle Michele fått en gastric bypass-operasjon, men resultatet er skuffende og Michele har hatt store problemer med livskvaliteten.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 602
programme.desc: Carina har fått fjernet hudkreft på nesen og fikk i 2012 gjort en rekonstruksjon med egen hud. I dag er hun så lei seg over nesen sin at hun ikke vil være med på familiebilder.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 704
programme.desc: Iben drømmer om å vinne kroppsfitness for nybegynnere, men hun føler at hennes bryster er i veien. Men uansett hvor mye hun jobber med kroppen sin, kan hun ikke trene brystene.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 512
programme.desc: Nina jobber som danser, men føler seg veldig utilpass i jobben fordi det ene brystimplantatet hennes flytter på seg og kløften hennes er mindre pen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 806
programme.desc: Tinas mareritt startet i 2015, når hun får en svulst på nesen som fortsetter å vokse. Hun må gjennomgå strålebehandling for å få den fjernet, men svulsten etterlater et gap som må lukkes.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 402
programme.desc: Vi møter Maja, som skammer seg så mye over silikonbrystene sine, at hun holder resultatet hemmelig for mannen sin.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 204
programme.desc: I dagens episode møter vi bl.a. Melissa, som gikk i tilbudsfellen, og Dorte, som syns at magen hennes ser ut som en rumpe.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 312
programme.desc: Angelina har operert brystene 11 ganger, og fikk lagt inn implantater på 1500 mm - som sprakk. Maria mener at man kan operere alt man er misfornøyd med på kroppen.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 803
programme.desc: Natasja har tidligere jobbet so, modell. I 2013 fikk hun implantatene i brystene sine fjernet, men operasjonen gikk ikke som planlagt og som et resultat har hun nå to forskjellige bryster

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 401
programme.desc: Vi møter perfeksjonisten Christina, som etter to keisersnitt har fått et stygt arr på magen, som hun forsøker å skjule.

programme.title: Skjønnhetsfellen Danmark: Episode 705
programme.desc: Som 21-åring drømmer Simone om runde og fyldige bryster. Hun gjør en brystforstørrende operasjon, men hun ender opp med betennelse og må gjøre flere reoperasjoner, før hun selv sier stopp til kirurgen.

programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.
