programme.title: World of Love Island
programme.desc: Velkommen til Love Island hvor hotte single som leter etter kjærlighet og konkurrerer mot hverandre om å bli på øya. Bøttevis av intriger, drama og, selvfølgelig, mye kjærlighet.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly's Big Decision
programme.desc: Hamburg skal få oppleve en ekte Tash-On Tours-tilstelning, men er de klare for at Marnie hopper på Aaron? Holly er paranoid når det gjelder ikke-forholdet til Kyle og Chloe og Nathan kommer, til alles forundring, nærmere hverandre.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Chloe's Big Meltdown
programme.desc: Den nye Chloe møter psykopat-Charlotte da en helaften går på skeive, og Hollys ankomst får en bitter ettersmak når hun hører den egentlige grunnen til hvorfor Kyle ikke vil være sammen med henne. Er det slutt nå?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Making It Official
programme.desc: Scotty T kommer tilbake og tar spranget når han inviterer alle med på et våget eventyr. Det er anspendt i huset mens Holly venter på Kyles beslutning. Har fortiden hennes ødelagt deres muligheter for en fremtid, eller vil han binde seg?

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly And Kyle's Bust Up
programme.desc: Sjefen Anna sender de feststemte Geordiene til kebabens hjemland Hellas. Det tar helt av når Scott og Chloe finner hverandre, Holly og Kyle fester, og Gaz og Charlotte havner i en veldig pinlig situasjon.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Secret Snogs
programme.desc: Geordiene får fullstendig sjokk når sjefen Anna sender dem til deres nye hjem på Kreta. Chloe vil vite hva Scott syns om henne, mens Charlotte og Marnie har en del å forklare etter at deres første kveld i Malia tar helt av.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Scotty And Aaron At War
programme.desc: Malia. Gaz' sjekkekonkurranse skaper splid mellom Aaron og Scott. Charlotte forteller Holly sannheten om Kyle, noe som kan ødelegge vennskapet deres. På togafesten kommer Chloe og Scott nærmere hverandre.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Break Up
programme.desc: Gjengen drar tilbake til Zante. Chloe skaper kaos på båtfesten, mens Kyle tar en stor avgjørelse når det gjelder Holly. Når Marnie ser Kyle på diskoteket, koker det over for henne og hele greia tar av.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Revenge Is Sweet
programme.desc: Zante. Gaz gir nydumpede Holly en oppstrammer og pusher henne til hun knekker sammen. Kyle nyter sin første guttekveld til jentene uventet dukker opp. Jentene tar hevn, Charlotte stikker og etterlater jentene og guttene uvenner.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Big Divide
programme.desc: Det er anspent når Geordiene setter seil mot Ios fordi Kyle og Hollys krangel fortsetter å dele guttene og jentene. Scott gjør Chloe opprørt, Holly konfronterer Kyle mens Charlotte gjør en ekstraordinær innsats på leting etter en kebab.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Aaron And Kyle's Bust Up
programme.desc: Ios. Chloes forsøk på å få Scotts oppmerksomhet går helt skeivt. En tur til stranden avslører en fin overraskelse for Nathan. Holly og Kyles situasjon tilspisser seg og får alvorlige konsekvenser for de to.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Home Truths For Holly
programme.desc: Mykonos. Etter hans dramatiske exit, venner gjengen seg til livet etter Kyle. Chloes plan om å gjøre Scott sjalu slår tilbake, og Charlotte gir Holly litt beinhard kjærlighet som ikke glir ned så lett.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Happy Gay Day!
programme.desc: Zante. Chloe og Holly stikker før Chloe konfronterer Scott og plumper ut med hva hun egentlig føler. I mens får Marnie en uventet telefon, og Nathan har store nyheter til familien.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The Proposal
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengens store, greske eventyr slutter på dramatisk vis. Etter at Cloe slapp K-bomben, vil Scott prate. En i familien får et overraskende besøk og Marnie har noen massive nyheter å komme med.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: New Girl In Town
programme.desc: Geordie-gjengen er tilbake og skaper hollabaloy! Chloe blir en slem heks for å få ha seg med Scott. Holly har en diger hemmelighet, men kan hun fortelle den? Og en ny deltager sjokkerer og får liv i gutta, men gjør Chloe svært stressa.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Hello Single Charlotte!
programme.desc: Charlotte kommer med store nyheter for Gaz . Kan Holly avsløre hemmeligheten sin nå? Aaron og Scotts dater med den nye jenta Chantelle ender dårlig.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Holly's Tears
programme.desc: Charlotte pusser snoppdetektivene på Gaz, og Scott forbløffer alle da han vil være kjæreste med den nye jenta Chantelle. Holly krangler med Charlotte da hun ser henne kysse Chloe.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: Girls Just Want To Have Fun
programme.desc: Mens Holly er borte tar Chloe og Charlotte vennskapet sitt til neste nivå. Chantelles plan for å teste Scott går helt feil og Chloe er rask til å utnytte det. Charlotte forsøker å ordne opp i ting med Holly.
programme.sub-title: Girls Just Want To Have Fun

programme.title: Geordie Shore: You're The Victim!
programme.desc: Sjefen Anna spanderer en tur til Hull på Geordiene. Gaz og Charlotte tilbringer natten sammen, og Chloe forteller endelig Chantelle sannheten om hva hun ga Scott. I tillegg kommer det enda en overraskelse når Marnie vender tilbake.

programme.title: Geordie Shore: The 'L' Bomb
programme.desc: Festaften! En ny gutt ankommer og Chloe gleder seg. Charlotte sjekker opp en fyr rett foran Gaz. Marnie blir gal når en av Aarons venninner dukker opp. Den nye gutten fyrer opp krangelen mellom Scott og Chantelle.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Let's Make it Official
programme.desc: Jenni lurer på hvordan det går mellom henne og Roger og forstår at de kanskje er verre ute og kjøre enn hun trodde. Mike vil ta forholdet med Paula et skritt videre...til han får virkeligheten i fanget.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Great Meatballs of Fire
programme.desc: Mike prøver å tilpasse seg å være i et forhold, men blir forvirret rundt hvordan reglene egentlig funker. Deena går tilbake til sitt liv som kjøttbolle, men må kjempe med nebb og klør for sine festrettigheter.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Control the Crazy
programme.desc: Sammi konfronterer Deena med hennes kjøttbolleutbrudd og de blir stående og stange. Mike og kompisene blir kjent med Paulas "ville" side, og Mike vet ikke helt om han kan takle det.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Make it Unofficial
programme.desc: Jenni planlegger en babyfest for Nicole og inviterer alle kameratene. Gutta støtter Mike som vil slå opp med Paula, og blir med ham for å oppleve øyeblikket fra første rad.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Shore Shower
programme.desc: MVP er tilbake og muliggjør en nær-trekantopplevelse for Vinny. Gjengen treffer på Angelina i en klubb. Jentene sliter med å holde babyfesten hemmelig for Nicole, og Vinny liker ikke tanken på seg selv og Jionni sammen på babyfesten.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Awkward!
programme.desc: Vinnie prater ut med Jionni og de ordner opp i flokene, så Vin og Nicole kan gjenoppta vennskapet om de vil. Samtidig innser Mike de feilene han har gjort og forsøker å få Nicoles tilgivelse.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Raining Men & Meatballs
programme.desc: Kjøttbollene tar over strandpromenaden og holder audition for å finne en midlertidig festkompis til Deena. Mike avslører at han var stripper før i tiden og romkameratene får ham til å vise sine kunster.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Icing on the Cake
programme.desc: Det er slutten på sommeren, og slutten på en lang reise for romkameratene når de forbereder seg på å ta et siste farvel med Seaside.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Reunion
programme.desc: Hver sommer kommer tusenvis av unge til Jersey Shore for å delta i østkystens overgangsritual: The Shore House. Jersey Shore viser dette fenomenet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 606
programme.desc: Deena forteller om da hun ble arrestert, Jenni og Rogers forhold analyseres, og Vinny forteller åpent om sin fordel.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 608
programme.desc: Deena og Sam starter en kjempekrangel på sofaen etter å ha sett noen provoserende klipp fra denne sesongen. Og Vinni feirer sin avgjørelse om å gå inn i sølibatet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: After Hours 610
programme.desc: I en spesiell guttekveld på sofaen snakker MVP og Ronnie om Mike og Paulas brudd - som møtte hverandre i Jersey Shore - og om hvorfor alle gutta var så tøffe mot Jionni.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Jersey Shore Best of Reunions
programme.desc: Amy Paffrath viser alle høydepunkter og lavmålene fra tidligere gjenforeninger, inkludert noen opptak som aldri er vist før.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: A New Family
programme.desc: Sommeren på Jersey Shore starter når åtte personer flytter inn i sommerhuset. Romantikken blomstrer mellom Sammy og Mike, men kan bli spolert når gutta inviterer tre tilfeldige jenter i boblebadet med dem.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: The Tanned Triangle
programme.desc: Snooki føler seg fortsatt utstøtt og vurderer å reise sin vei. Første kveld på klubben blir flørtete, så kjærestene hjemme har kanskje grunn til bekymring. Et trekantdrama truer med å splitte huset.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Good Riddance
programme.desc: Trekanten blir mer intens når Ronnie tar Sammy i å gi nummeret sitt til en annen gutt. En deltaker velger å forlate The Shore for godt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Fade to Black
programme.desc: Paulie og Mike må sjonglere flere grupper med jenter. Det blir slåsskamp i baren, og en av deltakerne blir slått ned.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Just Another Day at the Shore
programme.desc: Med støtte fra de fleste av de andre er Snooki på bedringens vei. Ronnies familie kommer på besøk, og Sammi ønsker å gjøre et godt førsteinntrykk. JWoww blir lei folkene i klubben og havner i slåsskamp.
programme.sub-title: Just Another Day at the Shore

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Boardwalk Blowups
programme.desc: Mike ber jenter til huset, og situasjonen kommer ut av kontroll. Snooki havner i slåsskamp igjen. Ronnie havner også i bråk, og Sammi begynner å tvile på forholdet deres.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: What Happens in the AC
programme.desc: Gjengen drar til Atlantic City, der moro blir til alvor idet Mike støter fra seg både Snooki og Jwoww. En av deltakerne avslører at hun har hatt spiseforstyrrelser.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: One Shot
programme.desc: Sommeren går mot slutten, men dramaet er ikke over. Pauly får en stalker, og en deltaker havner i fengsel etter en slåsskamp.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: That's How The Shore Goes
programme.desc: Ronnie slipper ut, og Snooki får trøst etter et møte med eksen. Gjengen tar farvel med The Shore, men ikke uten en siste tur i boblebadet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore: Season 1 Reunion
programme.desc: Man får svar på mange spørsmål når Snooki, The Situation, Jwoww, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi og Vinny kommer tilbake for mer krangling og innsikt i hva som faktisk foregikk i strandhuset i Jersey Shore.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 704
programme.desc: Når Roine laster okser, nekter de å gå opp på lastebilen. Og det er ikke lett å få okser på 1100 kg til å adlyde. Emina leverer fisk i sommervarmen, men havner bak saktegående feriegjester.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 705
programme.desc: Tove dekker opp for vikarer som har sommerferie og jobber derfor på dagtid. De nye arbeidstidene i det sommerlige Småland byr på andre problemer enn vanlig.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 706
programme.desc: Kranfører Carl har blitt bedt om å flytte en havnekran som veier nesten 200 tonn og er 33 meter høy. Men arbeidet må brått avbrytes fordi det er fare for at kranen kan velte når en del mangler.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 707
programme.desc: Mattias må hente kviger i Enköping og deretter hente en okse på Ljusterö, noe som ikke viser seg å være lett.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 708
programme.desc: I Stockholm har Max en tøff dag og sliter med å få med seg alle søppeldunkene som skal tømmes. Han gleder seg til den siste tømmingen for dagen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 201
programme.desc: Simon fra Piteå har tatt over som administrerende direktør i transportfirmaet etter sin far Erik. Jörgen fra Höganäs må kjøre et 58 meter langt blad til en vindturbin og støter på utfordringer i svingene.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 202
programme.desc: Erik Lundman i Lundmans transportfirma sliter med en kloakktank, postbud Stephanie gjør en feil og taper tid under en hastetur, og spesialtransportør Jari får utrolig nok tre punkteringer.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 203
programme.desc: Jesper er bekymret for å komme for sent til avlastningen i Danmark. Tove får en dårlig start på dagen og krasjer med tømmerbilen sin. Og Jari havner i feil havn under lossing.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 204
programme.desc: Louise har en uvanlig tung forsendelse med to ismaskiner som skal fraktes til en ishockeybane utenfor Stockholm. Robin, som kjører biler verdt millioner, har en kjøretur med en veldig fin Cobra fra 1965.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 305
programme.desc: I Kristinehamn i Sverige er Jörgen i ferd med å laste en 135 tonn tung barktønne da et høyt smell stopper lasteprosessen. Spylebilsjåføren Magnus og kollegaen Bruno sjekker et overvannsrør.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 401
programme.desc: Å finne frem i skogen er lettere sagt enn gjort. For den nyankomne tømmerbilsjåføren Linda betyr det at hun kommer på etterskudd i et allerede stramt tidsskjema.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 402
programme.desc: I Gøteborg flytter spesialtransportøren Jonathan campinghytter, og været er ikke på hans side. I Stockholm er rotter et problem, og Max, en søppelmann, vil helst slippe å møte dem.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 403
programme.desc: I Stockholm tømmer Max søppeldunker i kjendistette nabolag. Jörgen transporterer en 25 tonn tung gryte i Skåne, og veien dit er både smal og ujevn.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 404
programme.desc: Spesialtransportøren Johan transporterer 30 meter lange trebjelker. Slamsugeren Magnus tar seg av en pumpegrop, en risikofylt jobb på grunn av de farlige gassene som produseres.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 405
programme.desc: Anton kjører en grusknuser oppe i Norrland, og Amanda er på et kloakkrenseanlegg med kranbilen sin for å hjelpe til med å tømme en silo.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 406
programme.desc: Max har byttet ut byluften med skjærgården, og dagens oppdrag er å tømme søppeldunker på Ingarö. To termoser med kaffe og Emanuel er klar for en hel dag i skogen.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 407
programme.desc: Ingenting kan gå galt når Jörgen kjører en 70 tonns kran fra Värnamo til Helsingborg. Mickan kjører tømmer for første gang. Olivia transporterer kalver, men kalvene rømmer!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 408
programme.desc: Mattias kjører over 100 kviger og okser til beite. Tove laster tømmer i skogene i Småland. Jörgen kjører en transformator, men alt fungerer ikke som det skal!

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 501
programme.desc: Jörgen kjører en 50 tonns transformator i Skåne – men problemene avløser hverandre. Mattias har reist til den finske grensen for å frakte alpakkaer. Emina leverer fisk i Skåne.

programme.title: Svenske Truckers: Episode 502
programme.desc: Pappa Roine og Mattias laster høyballer – men plutselig stopper hjullasteren. Linda leverer drinker rundt i Stockholm – og benytter anledningen til å besøke forloveden Magnus. Piraten legger asfalt.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Three very strong and different models are judged in a high-octane final runway fashion show in Seoul for designer Lie Sang Bong.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head pass all their Rorscach tests. / Beavis and Butt-head inadvertently stop a suicide.
programme.sub-title: They're Coming to Take Me Away, Huh Huh (aka Psychiatrist)/ Jump!

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den nye fienden / Dobbelgjengeren
programme.desc: Vaskebjørner stjeler Beavis og Butt-Heads nachos, og guttene slår tilbake./ Beavis forveksler en fremmed med Butthead, og kan ikke bli kvitt ham.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Bokset inne / Birøktere
programme.desc: Beavis og Butt-Head fanges i en pappeske mens de prøver å gjemme seg på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head prøver å sanke honning fra et vepsebol.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday
programme.desc: The show parodies Leave It to Beaver / The duo needs to go to a hospital / Beavis cries and is mocked unrelentlessly / Highland experiences a toxic gas leak
programme.sub-title: Leave it to Beavis/ Butt Flambé / Crying / Doomsday

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bathroom Break / The Rat
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head decide to devote as much of their time at work as possible to bathroom breaks. / A fool and his nachos are soon parted... by a rat? A rat takes up residence and they stop at nothing.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head take woodworking class / Stevensons get a sattelite dish / An unopened can puts our duo to new adventures / Beavis and Butt-Head form a band called Metallica
programme.sub-title: Woodshop / T.V. Violence / Canned / Garage band

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Buy Beer / Just For Girls
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get drunk off non-alcoholic beer and fail a sobriety test. / Beavis and Butt-head are allowed to watch a film for girls about teen pregnancy. The titillation ends abruptly during the birthing sequence.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head crash a wedding in hopes of making out with the bride. / Beavis and Butt-head find a dead animal and try to sell its fur. But Beavis soon becomes attached to the lifeless creature.
programme.sub-title: Here Comes The Bride's Butt / Skin Trade

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Det farligste spillet / Beinjegerne
programme.desc: For å hindre den andre i å legge hånden i en bolle varmtvann så man tisser i buksa, holder guttene seg våkne i flere dager./ Beavis og Butt-Head bygger et dinosaurskjelett av bein fra en BBQ.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head become ace bounty hunters after a chance meeting with a reality TV. / With a big test looming, our favorite idiots receive an education in cheating. / Beavis and Butt-Head find themselves trapped in an elevator with a smokin hot chick
programme.sub-title: Bounty Hunters / School Test / Going Down

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Oil Change / Whiplash
programme.desc: After being instructed to change the oil in the fryer at Burger World, Beavis and Butt-head get the oil from a local gas station. / In an attempt to collect some big insurance money, Butt-head tries to give Beavis a whiplash injury while riding the school

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Candy Sale / To the Rescue
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head sell chocalate bars for their school. Well, the chocolate bars practically sell themselves. / Beavis and Butt-head witness a plane crash and appear in a cheesy reenactment on "Rescue 911."

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery
programme.desc: The school closes and makes the best day / Butt-Head phones in a mail-order bride / Burger World launches a home delivery service
programme.sub-title: A great day / Bride of Butt-Head / Special delivery

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Stewart is Missing / Yard Sale
programme.desc: Mrs. Stevenson shows up at Butt-head's house, desperate to enlist their help in finding Stewart. / Tom Anderson get Beavis and Butt-head to watch his yard sale, and the boys manage to sell everything when they take the sale inside.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Tainted Meat / Bad Dog
programme.desc: Beavis and his bacteria ridden "thingy" contaminate the food at Burger World. / Beavis and Butt-head adopt a vicious dog at a shelter and it trains them.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Crisis line / Career day
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head set out to support callers on a crisis line / Later they go out on work experience as security guards

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head
programme.desc: An evening of trick-or-treating takes a strange turn when Beavis becomes the Great Cornholio.
programme.sub-title: Bungholio: Lord of The Harvest (aka Halloween Special)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Wall Of Youth / Rabies Scare
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head get to express their innermost feeling in a special art exhibit. / Beavis becomes rabid.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Pool Toys / Beavis & Butt-Head's Island
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head help Mr. Anderson build an in-ground swimming pool. / "Beavis and Butt-head get stranded on their own island, while in search of cool chicks, like Ginger.BALL BREAKERS: Just how DO you crack open a bowling ball?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Substitute / Shopping List
programme.desc: A substitute teacher tries unconventional methods to reach Beavis and Butt-head. / Tom Anderson sends Beavis and Butt-head to the store to pick up a few items. They don't do a very good job.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Holy Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head is really screwed when a visit to the hospital once again awakens The Great Cornoholio in Beavis. But two rooms over, the leader of a cult has died. Is the Great Cornholio destined to be the cult's idiot savior?

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Bedpans & Broomsticks / Yogurt's Cool (aka Try Yogurt)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head pay off a debt to society by doing community service work in a hospital. / A suggestive commercial convinces Beavis & Butt-head it's time to try frozen yogurt.
programme.sub-title: Bedpans & Broomsticks / Yogurt's Cool (aka Try Yogurt)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head come to the aid of a wounded baby bird...almost. / Beavis and Butt-head show up at an AA meeting hoping to score some booze.
programme.sub-title: A Very Special Episode / Dumbasses Anonymous

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Nektet service / Balleskvis
programme.desc: Beavis prøver yogabukser og får dem ikke av. / Guttene oppdager at de har rett til å nekte service til kunder på Burger World.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head try to stay awake all night, in an attempt to discover the secret behind morning wood. / For his oral report on an historical figure, Beavis recounts the valuable lessons he learned one night while eating at Burger World.
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of Morning Wood / U.S. History

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: En spirituell reise
programme.desc: Beavis ser ansiktet til Jesus i en nacho-chips. Det sender ham på en episk reise for å finne svar på det store spørsmålet - "Hvorfor får jeg aldri pult?"

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Nose Bleed / Vaya Con Cornholio
programme.desc: Butt-head tries some sadistic home remedies in an attempt to stop Beavis's nosebleed. / When Beavis turns into Cornholio in Burger World, Immigration Officials take him in as a possible illegal alien and try to make sense of his gibberish.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head explore the career possibilities in selling blood. / While causing mischief at a drive-in movie theatre, Beavis & Butt-head experience a new phase of the moon.
programme.sub-title: Give Blood / Beware of the Butt (aka Drive-In #1)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)
programme.desc: Suffering from nasty colds, Beavis & Butt-head visit a doctor in hopes of glomming a prescription remedy. / Beavis & Butt-head's school assignment is to write a poem in the venerated Haiku format.
programme.sub-title: Sick / For Better or Verse (aka Haiku)

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Figure Drawing / Date Bait
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-head get to look at real nudes. / The return of Lolita and Tanqueray! Beavis and Butt-head go on their first date, well, almost.

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: To teite menn / Fredagsgalskap
programme.desc: Middelaldrende Beavis og Butt-Head oppfyller sin samfunnsplikt som jurymedlemmer./ Beavis og Butt-Head tror feilaktig at de har byttet kropp.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Car Wash / Kidnapped
programme.desc: Beavis & Butt-head attempt to make some money washing cars. / Beavis & Butt-head decide that kidnapping Stewart would be a quick way to some cash.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Politically Correct / True Crime
programme.desc: To better understand their female classmates, Beavis & Butt-head must get in touch with their feelings. Huh huh, he said "touch." / Beavis & Butt-head unknowingly star in their favorite crime reenactment shows.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap
programme.desc: Beavis starts mimicing Butt-Head / A quiet day in Highland, Texas / Our duo enrolls in a fitness class
programme.sub-title: Follow me / Nothing happening / Take a lap

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Scared Straight / Citizen Butt-head Part 2
programme.desc: To teach them that crime doesn't pay, Beavis & Butt-head's principal sends them to prison for a day. Bad idea. / Beavis & Butt-head and President Clinton explore chaos theory together.

programme.title: Beavis and Butt-Head: Sporting goods / Cow tipping
programme.desc: Beavis and Butt-Head decide to get athletic gear supporters for gym class / The duo venture out on a quest for cow tipping

programme.title: Mike Judge's Beavis & Butt-Head: Den rare jenta / Tidsreisen
programme.desc: Beavis møter en hemmelig beundrer på skolen./ Beavis og Butt-Head krysser frem og tilbake over delstatslinjen inn i Mountain Time Zone og tror de kan reise i tiden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Etter å ha tatt farvel med en av sine egne, forstår de resterende treningsleir-kandidatene at ingens posisjon på troppen er sikker. Kitty Carter blir bedt om å jobbe med de svakeste jentene og piske dem i form.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Hele troppen trenger en oppvekker og det skal de få av gjestekoreograf Kitty Carter. Hun leder gruppen gjennom en knallhard danseøvelse som gjør noen av jentene til emosjonelle vrak. Så er det tid for en leksjon i DCCs etikette.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Noen drømmer går i oppfyllelse når de gjenværende heldige treningsleir-kandidatene står modell i den ikoniske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-drakten under en sexy fotoseanse.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Flere kan miste plassen på laget, og det er bare to øvelser igjen. Jentene drar på seg de berømte hvite cowboy-støvlene for første gang. Så skal Judy og Megan Fox bedømme deres endelige danserutiner.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: Seks hundre nervøse og spente Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader-aspiranter ankommer et hotell til de første uttakene. Hver deltaker får mindre enn to minutter på seg til å utføre en freestyle-danserutine foran dommerne.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: I det endelige uttaket er det bare de sterkeste som overlever. DCC-aspirantene må nå konkurrere mot veteranene om en plass på treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hvis kandidatene trodde at uttaket var tøft, får de seg en overraskelse når den brutale treningsleiren sparkes i gang. Uke 1 på Valley Ranch starter med at jentene finner ut hva dommerne hadde å si om dem.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: Det er bare den tredje uken av treningsleiren, men det er allerede tid for å gjøre kutt. Hvem vil overleve? Uken starter med tilpassing av drakten der også aspirantene får prøve på det berømte blå og hvite antrekket.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: DCC-"looken" - rett hår eller krøller? Blond eller rødhåret? Jentene aner ikke hva Kelli og salongdirektøren Rainer Schneck har planlagt for dem når de får sine dramatiske Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders- makeovers.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Når DCC-direktøren Kelli Finglass gir en tidligere deltaker en utrolig sjanse til å delta på treningsleiren tre uker etter starten, er det mye å ta igjen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: Hun er tilbake! Den beryktede Kitty Carter kommer til Valley Ranch for å undervise DCCene i teknikk. Deretter skal Charlotte Jones Anderson guide en gruppe cheerleadere på en privat tur rundt Cowboys Stadium.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: Kelli og Judy må ta tøffe beslutninger som er rettferdige, men vonde. Det er oppgjørets time for de gjenværende treningsleir-kandidatene, da det bare er to repetisjoner igjen før den siste elimineringen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 1
programme.desc: For første gang er det det praktfulle Cowboys-stadionet i Texas som er basen for Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-uttaket. Over 600 aspiranter med drømmer om å komme på 2010-2011 DCC-laget ankommer før soloppgang for innledningsrunden.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 2
programme.desc: De 47 nye jentene som skal delta på DCC-finaleuttaket har hatt to uker til å forberede seg, men er de klare til å danse sammen med de 27 tilbakevendende DCC-veteranene?

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 3
programme.desc: DCC Training Camp begynner i kveld! Treningsleir-kandidatene ankommer Valley Ranch for første gang og får muligheten til å møte sine idoler og mentorer - DCC-veteranene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 4
programme.desc: I den andre uken av treningsleiren vil noen av aspirantene bli sendt hjem. Noen få utvalgte veteraner skal filme et segment for Good Morning America, og de hjelper til med å virkeliggjøre en livslang drøm for en heldig dame.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 5
programme.desc: Uke fire av treningsleiren begynner med at nykommerne får en DCC-"makeover". Fra hår og sminke til selvbruning og tannbleking, blir aspirantene forvandlet til DCC-representanter.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 6
programme.desc: Slutten på treningsleiren nærmer seg og DCC-portretter står på planen. Treningsleir-aspirantene og -veteranene er klare for sine nærbilder, kledd i spesialsydde DCC-drakter og med feilfritt hår og sminke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 7
programme.desc: 2010 Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders-troppen skal kunngjøres i løpet av de neste to dagene. Det sier seg selv at det er en stressende tid for treningsleir-aspirantene. Tiden er inne for å imponere.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Episode 8
programme.desc: 34 nykommere og veteraner møter opp i drakten for å ta gruppebildet. Men gledens dag dempes av at direktøren og koreografen til Dallas Cowboy Cheerleaders ennå ikke har offisielt kunngjort 2010-troppen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Prøvedansingen begynner
programme.desc: Cowboys stadion i Arlington i Texas blir nok en gang stedet for prøvedansingen til Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders. 500 kandidater drømmer om å komme med i DCC-kvalifiseringen 2011-2012 DCC før soloppgang.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: På banen
programme.desc: Det storslagne Cowboys stadion er stedet for DCCs avsluttende prøvedansing. Presset blir høyt for 69 nye jenter når 18 DCC-veteraner deltar i den ettertraktede invitasjonen til treningsleiren.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Treningsleiren
programme.desc: DCCs treningsleir begynner på Valley Ranch i kveld! De nye kandidatene stresser påtagelig foran treningsleiren mens de kjemper for å endre planene og sikre nye boformer i Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Den brømte uniformen
programme.desc: To uker inn i treningsleiren, forbereder Kelli og Judy sin første opptreden. Ukens øvelser er viktige for alle jentene. De forventes å beherske de verdensberømte DCC-sparkene og splitthoppene.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Fornyelse
programme.desc: På treningsleirens tredje uke blir nybegynnerne DCC-fornyet. Hår og sminke blir piffet opp når de blir støpt i DCC-formen.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Portrettfotografering
programme.desc: Kveldens øvelser begynner med et smell da teknisk sjef for DCC, Kitty Carter, kommer på overraskende besøk til Valley Ranch.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team: Feltøvelse
programme.desc: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders er to uker unna første omgang, og DCC-sjefen Kelli McGonagill Finglass og koreografen Judy Trammel er presset for at de skal klare utvelgingen og offentliggjøre laget.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 4
programme.desc: 70-year-old Fred is blue-lighted in having suffered a serious fall at home. With a shortage of doctors in the department, he’s taken straight for an urgent x-ray after which he’s transferred to the care of Dr Tom Hawthorne.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 5
programme.desc: The flow of patients at Barnsley Casualty is relentless and today staff are put under even more pressure by patients suffering from the effects of drink or drugs but all need the care of doctors and nurses - whatever their issues.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 6
programme.desc: When a key member of staff calls in sick at the last minute, Sister Rachael’s dream of smooth shift disappears. She must manage a department overflowing with patients, struggling with staff shortages, with longer waiting times and no available beds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 7
programme.desc: Every bed in the department is occupied but there are still 20 patients waiting for the next one to be vacated. Lead Nurse Steph is already struggling to manage the mounting number of patients when the emergency alarm sounds.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 8
programme.desc: It’s another grueling shift for team at Barnsley Hospital’s Casualty Department. Juggling a backlog of walk-in patients and a constant stream of new ambulance emergencies, they’re struggling to keep waiting times down.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 9
programme.desc: Today, the pace at Barnsley Casualty is relentless; other hospitals in the area are full and as a result, ambulances are being diverted to Barnsley. In one of them is 17-year-old Alex who has had a fit after falling from his bike..

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 10
programme.desc: Sister Rachel is running the shift and she’s under pressure with a shortage of cubicles. To make matters worse, IT systems start to fail across the hospital causing chaos for patient flow.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 11
programme.desc: It’s only the start of her shift but Sister Jane Hawksworth has lost count of the number of times the emergency red phone has rung. Resus is completely full of the most ill patients and it’s having a knock-on effect across the whole department.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 12
programme.desc: At Barnsley casualty today, there’s no available beds, no movement on the wards and no patient flow. To make matters worse, the lead nurse in charge, Kelly, is also struggling with a backlog of ambulances waiting with patients needing treatment.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 13
programme.desc: The staff at Barnsley casualty are enjoying an unusually peaceful start to the day and superstition dictates that on days like this, there’s one word that must never be uttered - the Q word!

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 14
programme.desc: There’s a new Matron in charge at Barnsley Casualty today - it’s Hannah’s first day in her new role but it’s not going to be an easy one. The department is completely full, there’s no movement and patients just keep on arriving.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 15
programme.desc: The first heatwave of summer has hit Barnsley and it’s adding to the pressure of an already stressful day in casualty for Sister Jane who’s in charge today. The department is hot, stuffy, and bursting with patients all needing emergency treatment.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 16
programme.desc: It’s another relentless shift for the team at Barnsley casualty and running the hub today is Sister Jane. Staff are struggling to meet the 15-minute assessment target time but doing all they can.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 17
programme.desc: It’s a big day at Barnsley Casualty, for the first time since the Covid pandemic hit the UK, staff can finally remove their masks. For some it’s a happy, welcome relief, but others aren’t ready to go mask-free just yet.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 18
programme.desc: It’s the hottest day of the year at Barnsley Casualty. Sister Vicky has the job of keeping patients and staff cool, but with temperatures outside approaching forty degrees, it won’t be easy.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 19
programme.desc: There’s a covid spike at Barnsley Casualty and positive cases are flooding in adding pressure to an already busy day. Sister Rachel is in charge today and because of covid she’s short on space and staff.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 20
programme.desc: Patients are flooding into Barnsley Casualty today and Sister Jane is in charge and up to her eyes. Suddenly a patient who has come in with stomachache goes into labor - she had no idea she was pregnant.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 1
programme.desc: In tonight’s first episode, severe weather conditions are placing the casualty department under even more pressure than usual. Clocking on today is Consultant Dr Julian Humphrey who has a reputation for keeping staff morale high .

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Episode 2
programme.desc: In tonight’s episode, staffing problems hit the department as several nurses call in sick. The team clocking on is forced to juggle extra patients to make sure every emergency is seen.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 2
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Bill and Antionette from Newport, who share their home with their 3 cats. They admit they’ve not deep cleaned their home since they moved in.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 3
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of married couple Lynne and Keith from Chudleigh in South Devon whose house hasn’t had a deep clean since they moved in nearly 20 years ago.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: From the outside 69-year-old Barbara’s house in Braintree looks like any other on the street, but she wasn’t always a hoarder, as the tragic deaths of her husband and son sent her life spiraling out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In West London, former exotic dancer Dione’s flat is bursting at the seams with a lifetimes collection of memorabilia and hand me down relics. Help is at hand as deep cleaning arrive to clear the hoard.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: In the South Wales Valleys, 42-year-old Phillip has it all, he runs a successful business, he’s in a long-term relationship, he owns his own home and... he has a rat infested, humongous hoard.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 12
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Alan, a sound therapist who has lived on his own for 20 years. His son has tried to help him clean, but it’s a battle he’s never been able to win.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 4
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Anita from Manchester, who’s house is overrun with her 3 cats who make a mess wherever they like.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 5
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Scout Leader and Single mum of two; Debbie from South London, whose 2-bed flat is drowning in clutter and filth.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: Hoarding is on the rise and it's believed that 1 in 20 people could have a problem. With over 1.2 million problem hoarders in the UK today, one could be your neighbour?

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: Susan's hoard has made her virtually homeless. Brian has dedicated his life to hoarding and his daughter is sick of it. Jake is lucky to be alive as his home almost burned to the ground in an inferno fuelled by the clutter he'd collected.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: Arthur's flat is packed with junk. Experts Caz and Tee are up for their toughest assignment ever. Khim is getting married but first she must clear her hoard. Mandi's passion for vintage clothes is out of control.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 4
programme.desc: Esther's hoard is so bad her landlord told her to clear up or clear out. Nigel receives a visit from fellow hoarder Janice.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 5
programme.desc: Paul's hoard fills his whole house, room after room after room is buried under 6 feet of clutter.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 9
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Sue from Oxford whose house is overflowing with possessions. Sue married the love of her life in 2015, and he moved in, bringing everything he owned with him.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 10
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Linda and husband Andy from Bedau in South Wales whose house is overrun with animals and hasn’t been cleaned in 4 years.

programme.title: Dirty Home Rescue: Episode 11
programme.desc: Hayley Leitch and her cleaning team Tom Swire and Chesley Medley-Brown go to the rescue of Joanna from Birmingham, whose 2-bedroom flat is overflowing with possessions. Joanna works two jobs, leaving her no time to look after her home.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 1
programme.desc: In the picturesque city of Bath, Paul’s cottage is bursting at the seams with a lifetime’s collection of junk. Known locally as ‘boot cottage’ - because everything Paul owns and wears comes from car boot sales - every room is a no-go zone.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 2
programme.desc: In Harlow, 63-year-old Bubbles’ high-rise flat is packed with piles of junk she can’t bear to throw away. But it doesn’t end there she also has a staggering 4 lock ups stuffed to the gills with rubbish.

programme.title: Ekstreme samlere: Episode 3
programme.desc: In Mansfield Sue’s hoard is driving her family and grandchildren away and her husband Neil to distraction. Every room is crammed with clutter including a bedroom that looks more like a dolls graveyard than somewhere to sleep.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: On the busy A1 halfway between Newcastle and Durham an artic has veered into a 6-foot Armco roadside barrier, propelling it into the air and down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: In Hertfordshire Lantern Recovery op Sean has been sent to tackle a telehandler that's flipped over in the back of a very muddy garden. To make matters worse, the boom arm is extended and there are trees covering the site.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: On the M25 near Enfield two lorries, two cars, and a Transit have piled into each other blocking three of four lanes. In a ten-mile tailback, the Lantern team must recover the two artics.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: When a forty-tonne lorry careers off the M1 and plunges down an embankment it's down to Incident Manager Steve to pick up the pieces.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: On the M11 a truck pulling a trailer is marooned. Alpha recovery is with a motorhome that's been gutted by fire. Merrie's dicing with danger on the side of a slip road and Mark helps a van that is wedged down a muddy ditch.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: Kev from Alpha is sent to locate a 32-tonne tipper stuck in a boggy field. Lanterns Steve Knight is called out to an artic wedged between a ditch and a lamppost.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: Alpha's Kevin is with a 75-tonne crane that's stranded in remote countryside. Lantern's newest op Euan battles through a jam caused by the lorry he has been sent to recover on his first solo call-out.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: Vehicles in need of recovery include a Land Rover Discovery dumped in a canal, an artic that has lost traction on a steep gradient, and a truck that's nosedived into a back garden.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: Alpha op Kev has been sent to a popular beauty spot to rescue a bin delivery truck that has got stuck. Lantern op Steve is sent to a scaffolding truck that's stuck in a sinkhole and Crouch op Wes has a weighty problem when a truck hits the skids.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 21
programme.desc: We return to the biggest and best rollovers - ever! In this episode – it's stories of Ice, Fire, and Water.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 22
programme.desc: We return to the biggest and best rollovers - ever! In this episode, the Crouch legend Jim and his team, face a tanker full of dangerous Acid on its side.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Beast from the East descends, bringing some of the country's busiest roads to a standstill.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 2
programme.desc: A heavy loader carrying cardboard tips over. Rural Staffordshire is seemingly no match for former army boy Jim. Snow threatens to leave rescuer Mark stranded.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: When a fully-loaded double-deck curtain-sided HGV rolls over on the A6, Fluff and his team need to create a second mess to solve the first.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Marcus Charman and Trigger patch up an HGV's fuel tank during evening rush hour. Tez resorts to using a blowtorch to fix a car transporter's snapped spring.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: On one of the UK's busiest roads, a jackknifed HGV has careened through a front garden, over a ditch, and blocked a lane of traffic. Meanwhile, Jim's mettle is tested.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: A utility truck has got stuck in the mud in someone's garden. Adam and his team are under pressure to get it out without causing thousands of pounds worth of damage to the property.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: Near the junction to East Midlands airport, a trailer sheds its load and causes rush hour chaos. Adam dispatches a crack team of his finest recovery ops.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A 20-tonne digger has been written off after it fell into the Thames, and Jim has to work fast to get a stranded HGV driver to safety.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 606
programme.desc: Den siste gangen Fatima Berggren ble sett i live var på hennes 57-årsdag i mai 2017. Saken blir først betraktet som en kidnapping, men uten livstegn fra Fatima, anser politiet det snart som en drapssak.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 602
programme.desc: En regnfull morgen den 19. oktober 2004 dreper en ukjent mann en åtte år gammel gutt og en 56 år gammel kvinne i Linköping. Gjerningsmannen forsvinner sporløst og politiet må nå finne ut hvem han er.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 205
programme.desc: Etter meldinger om et rykende bål i Hafjell går drapsalarmen hos politiet på Lillehammer. På bålet viser det seg å ligge rester av et partert menneske. Samtidig meldes to personer savnet fra en bolig i nærheten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 305
programme.desc: 19. desember 1994 setter Bjørn Thore Langemyhr seg på et tog fra Tønsberg til Oslo. Det er det siste familien ser til ham. Samtidig begynner ryktene å gå om at et belastet rusmiljø kan ha tatt livet av Langemyhr.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 508
programme.desc: Etter en fest i juli 2017 forsvinner Tom Rune Hagen. Han har vært en del av et belastet rusmiljø, men akkurat denne uka har han planlagt en tur på fjellet for å fiske. Hva skjedde med Tom Rune?

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 601
programme.desc: Den 14. november 2019 forsvinner sytten år gamle Wilma, og hele Uddevalla blir involvert i forsvinningen. Etter noen dager blir det funnet blod i hennes og kjærestens leilighet, men Wilma er fortsatt savnet.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 701
programme.desc: I september 2020 blir Erik Fasth funnet livløs i en blodpøl utenfor rommet til den funksjonshemmede kvinnen han er assistent for. Politiet begynner umiddelbart å undersøke hva som har skjedd.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 502
programme.desc: I 2016 går politiet til aksjon i en privatbolig på Romerike. På eierens datamaskin finner de harddisker fulle av bilder og videosnutter med seksuelle handlinger fra unge gutter ned i 9-årsalderen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 507
programme.desc: 13. desember 2008 skjer det som omtales som den verste brannen i Oslo siden krigen, i Urtegata på Grønland. Det ble fort mistenkt at brannen var påsatt.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 505
programme.desc: I 1999 brenner huset til Knut Øyvind Moe ned til grunnen i Valdres. To dager senere blir levningene hans hentet ut av brannruinene, og det viser seg at han ble skutt og drept i forkant av brannen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 607
programme.desc: Den 7. april 2017 var Stockholm den neste i rekken av hovedstader som ble utsatt for terrorhandlinger. I denne episoden følger vi politiets ekstremt intense jakt på terroristen Rakhmat Akilov.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 103
programme.desc: To turgåere finner et utbrent lik på et bål langs en øde skogsbilvei på Veståsen i Søndre Land. I flere uker står politiet helt uten svar på hvem som kan stå bak den groteske handlingen.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En tidlig februarmorgen i Stockholm melder en mann sin kone, Sacha, savnet. Etter hvert som politiet graver i parets fortid, oppdager de et turbulent forhold under den tilsynelatende ryddige overflaten.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 204
programme.desc: På kvelden 1. nyttårsdag i 2012 utløses trygghetsalarmen hjemme hos 98 år gamle Hilda Feste. Da hjemmetjenesten rykker ut blir de vitne til en grufull hendelse. Politiet starter umiddelbart opp jakten på gjerningsmannen.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 403
programme.desc: Marit Ødegaard jobber på en veikro ikke langt fra svenskegrensen. En oktoberdag i 2000 dukker hun ikke opp på jobb. Kort tid etter blir Marit funnet drept i hjemmet sitt

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker: Episode 604
programme.desc: En 33 år gammel mann blir funnet skutt og drept nær Sundsvall. Det viser seg å være en mann med mange fiender, og politiets liste består i begynnelsen av over femti personer med mulige motiver.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En ung mann blir funnet død på et jorde utenfor Enköping. Ved første øyekast ser det ut som om han har lagt seg ned for å hvile - men når politiet undersøker liket, oppdager de noe som antas å være et skuddsår.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 506
programme.desc: 26. januar 2001 ble Benjamin Hermansen knivstukket til døde som følge av sin hudfarge. Drapet fikk hele landet til å delta i antirasistiske markeringer og protester.

programme.title: Svenske krimsaker
programme.desc: En familie som rammes av en husbrann klarer å unnslippe flammene, men alt de eier har blitt til aske. Det som først ser ut til å være en ulykke, viser seg å være mye mer komplisert.

programme.title: Norske Krimsaker: Episode 105
programme.desc: Tina Jørgensen forsvant etter en kveld på byen i Stavanger. En måned senere finner politiet liket av en 20 år gammel kvinne. Hvem kan ha tatt livet av Tina og deretter dumpet henne langs en øde veistrekning?

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Jonbee, Hudson & Violet, and Buford
programme.desc: A ferocious stray Jindo in desperate need of rescue, a Great Dane wreaks havoc on house and home, a boxer mourns the death of a beloved mate.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs
programme.desc: Traumatized canine victims of Hurricane Katrina are rehabilitated; a couple's dogs finally meet; a big dog's dangerous appetite for toys, towels and trampolines.
programme.sub-title: Isis & Tina, Nugget, and the Katrina Dogs

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Buddy, Tiger & Roxy, and Booker
programme.desc: Cesar tries to rehabilitate two Rottie pups before they grow into dangerous attack dogs. Buddy, has a bad habit of biting. A Visla cowers and cringes at the sights and sounds of the city.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Duke & Lulu, and Sparky
programme.desc: Cesar heads to the dog park to help some frustrated dog lovers. A therapeutic terrier helps AJ control her panic attacks but tends to attack other dogs.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren
programme.desc: A Min Pin turns ferocious. Actress Denise Richards' pug gets overprotective and aggressive towards visitors. A stubborn Bassett Hound has to literally be dragged places he doesn't want to go.
programme.sub-title: Chip, Leo, Hank, Lucy and Betty

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Spike, Jake & Nugget, and Wendel
programme.desc: A wedding date is cancelled because the dogs can't get along; a German Shepherd that's so aggressive, even the German Shepherd rescue center won't take him; Sheltie barks at everything.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Pasha, Cosmo, and Contessa
programme.desc: Pasha lashes out at people, especially children. Cosmo’s bitten several people including the postman. Contessa is highly aggressive towards TV shows, especially Dog Whisperer.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eppie, Lady, and Snoopy
programme.desc: A Beagle with a passion for boogie boarding, a Dalmatian/German shepherd dangerously protective of her owner; Lab/Beagle mix that became aggressive after moving to a new area.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Major Jones, Josie, and Scrappy
programme.desc: Catchup with the hurricane Katrina rescue dogs. Is a reunion with their owners in store for any of them? A German Shephard learns to walk on a leash. A lab won’t walk on hardwood floors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Princess Cujo, Prada, and Bearz
programme.desc: Los Angeles Lakers executive Jeanie Buss asks Cesar to take the "Cujo" out of Princess. Prada, a pampered Pomeranian throws vicious temper tantrums, and Bearz, a Rottweiler attacks shopping carts.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Greta & Hoss, Storm, and Chula
programme.desc: Cesar helps a young Akita control his aggression; Newfoundland is the world's pickiest eater; two-year old Shiba Inu has a knack for bolting out open doors.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole
programme.desc: Cesar goes to jail to help wayward humans rehabilitate wayward pups through a program called "Pups on Parole."; Bulldogs learn to play fair.
programme.sub-title: Eton & Dolly, and the Pups on Parole

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Vicky & Taz, Punkin, and Maddy
programme.desc: Vicious Min Pins endanger a couple's home-based business; Pit Bull mix develops an unhealthy obsession with rocks; Cesar helps an adopted Terrier mix overcome her fear of men.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Bikini, Fella, Winston and Oliver
programme.desc: Bull terrier won't behave at home and has irrational fear of grooming; Jack Russell / Italian Greyhound mix cries and barks whenever left alone; a police officer's Yorkies are disturbing the peace.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Sugar, Dax, Nixa, Pete, and Snowflake
programme.desc: Feuding German Shepherds vie to be top dog; Beagle has proven to be anything but sweet; Judi's Bichon Frise has forced her out of her own bed for fear of being bitten in the middle of the night.
programme.sub-title: Sugar, Dax, Nixa, Pete, and Snowflake

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Cesar’s Toughest Cases
programme.desc: This episode features several of Cesar's toughest cases including: a skateboard munching Bulldog, vicious Min-Pin and ferocious Chihuahua. Plus, updates on how the dogs are doing now.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Power of the Pack
programme.desc: The pack is a vital tool. In this intimate and revealing episode, witness some of the most memorable moments and experience the power of the pack.

programme.title: Hundehviskeren: Kobe, Banjo, and Kisses
programme.desc: An aggressive one-eyed Australian shepherd needs special treatment. A traumatized black and tan coonhound is terrified of people, a Maltese gets a little too excited when guests drop by.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken
programme.desc: Sharon Marshs tante Flo har gaver til Shelly og Stan. Shelly får et flott stereoanlegg, mens Stan får en skummel fisk.

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.title: South Park: Chinpoko Mon
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: South Park: Da Wall-Mart kom til byen
programme.desc: Stan og Kyle prøver å forhindre at Wall-Mart forvandler South Park til en spøkelsesby, men en besatt Cartman står i deres vei.

programme.title: South Park: Fåraktig
programme.desc: Mens han er på en gruppeterapitime mot hamstring, blir Stan fanget i en drøm om skolerådgiveren Mr. Mackey.

programme.title: South Park: Gothbarn 3: posørenes daggry
programme.desc: Goth-ungene sendes på leir for problembarn.

programme.title: South Park: Freemium er ikke gratis
programme.desc: Stan blir avhengig av det nye mobilspillet med Terrance og Phillip.

programme.title: South Park: Heksesønner
programme.desc: På den årlige Halloween-sammenkomsten, kaster en heks trolldom som terroriserer alle i South Park.

programme.title: South Park: Råtne tomater
programme.desc: Barna i South Park påstår at de har sett mr. Garrison luske rundt i byen. Folk i byen er sinte fordi presidenten skremmer barna deres.

programme.title: South Park: Sparkesyklene
programme.desc: Ungene planlegger å bruke siste nytt innen forflytning for å skaffe seg mer godteri til halloween enn de har fått noen gang.

programme.title: South Park: Tegridy Farms Halloween Special
programme.desc: Det er Halloween og Randy må forholde seg til datterens marihuanaproblem.

programme.title: South Park: Øyekatarr
programme.desc: Det er Halloween i South Park, og Kenny blir drept av en styrtende romstasjon og forvandlet til en zombie, ved hjelp av balsameringsvæske og Worcestersaus.

programme.title: South Park: Universets største drittsekk
programme.desc: Cartman føler seg ikke bra etter å ha drukket Kennys aske og blitt besatt av sjelen hans, og sendes til sykehuset.

programme.title: South Park: Helvete på jord 2006
programme.desc: Det er halloween, og Satan holder verdens største kostymefest.

programme.title: South Park: De levende hjemløses natt
programme.desc: Uteliggere oversvømmer South Park, og guttene legger en lur plan for å flytte dem til en annen by, mens de voksne får panikk.

programme.title: South Park: Den ustoppelige
programme.desc: Evig uskyldige Butters er lei behandlingen han får av foreldrene, og blir litt for oppslukt av den nye vampyrfeberen.

programme.title: South Park: Døde kjendiser
programme.desc: Michael Jacksons spøkelse nekter å akseptere å måtte vandre heden og etterlater resten av de nylig avdøde berømtheter frustrert i Skjærsilden.

programme.title: South Park: Zimmermans verdenskrig
programme.desc: Cartman anser Token for å være en trussel mot hele menneskeheten.

programme.title: South Park: Mecha Streisand
programme.desc: Cartman og Kyle krangler om et magisk triangel som kan forvandle Barbra Streisand til et fryktelig monster.

programme.title: South Park: Regnskog sjmegnskog
programme.desc: Guttene sendes til regnskogen i Costa Rica med et kor.

programme.title: South Park: Glødhet katolsk kjærlighet
programme.desc: Presten Maxi reiser til Roma da skandalen i den katolske kirken truer med å påvirke antallet kirkegjengere i South Park negativt.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien
programme.desc: South Park tar en 'Cloverfield' med store, mystiske skapninger som herjer rundt i verden og blir fanget opp av Randys kamera.

programme.title: South Park: Pandemien 2: Alarmerende
programme.desc: Enorme marsvin angriper byer i hele verden. Guttene har nøkkelen til å redde menneskeheten, men sitter fast i Andesfjellene.

programme.title: South Park: Mysterion reiser seg
programme.desc: Ført an av 'Mysterion', jobber 'Coon' og vennene hans med å hjelpe folk i Gulfen. Og 'Coon' er ute etter hevn.

programme.title: South Park: Coon mot Coon og venner
programme.desc: 'The Coon' viser seg å være enda ondere en den mørke mesteren Cthulhu, når han krever hevn over sine tidligere partnere.

programme.title: South Park: Den fattige ungen
programme.desc: Kennys foreldre blir arrestert og han plasseres i fosterhjem - så nå er Cartman det fattigste barnet på skolen! I mellomtiden kommer en mystisk figur fra fortiden tilbake.

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Den nye gutten i klassen overtaler Jesus til å kjempe mot Satan, i det endelige oppgjøret mellom godt og ondt. Cartman blir rasende når han oppdager at oppgjøret krasjer med bursdagsfesten hans.

programme.title: South Park: Den skumle fisken

programme.title: South Park: Succubusen
programme.desc: Cartman går til optiker, som gjør narr av Cartmans vektproblemer og kaller ham 'Piggy'.

programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Cartman og Kenny blir oppslukt av det siste nye fra Japan: Chinpokomon.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey, julebæsjen
programme.desc: Borgermesteren vil lage en høytidsfeiring som ikke støter noen, og Kyle tror han har løsningen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Dead of Winter
programme.desc: When the tunnel world is having an annual event, Paracelcus makes plans to crash the event and do something.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: God Bless the Child
programme.desc: With Catherine's help, a pregnant teenage hooker is welcomed into the tunnels. Complications arise when she falls in love with Vincent.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Sticks and Stones
programme.desc: A deaf girl, who used to live below, falls in with a street gang that threatens to put an end to her first serious love affair.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Fair and Perfect Knight
programme.desc: Catherine befriends a boy from the world below who leaves the tunnels to go college.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Labyrinths
programme.desc: A young man gets lost in the tunnel world and he is found by the inhabitants. They're uncertain if they should let him go because they're not sure if he can be trusted to keep their secret.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Brothers
programme.desc: Vincent's "brother" Devin returns with Charles, a hideously deformed man seeking sanctuary.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Gentle Rain
programme.desc: Kanin, a resident of the Underworld, goes into a store on the surface and is recognized by a woman as the man who killed her son, years ago.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Outsiders"
programme.desc: When intruders penetrates their tunnel world, father decides to welcome them with gifts, but instead of gratitude, they are met with greed and violence. Things escalate to the point that tunnel dwellers have no other choice but to leave.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Orphans
programme.desc: After her father dies, Catherine thinks about living the rest of her life in the world below.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Arabesque
programme.desc: Vincent's childhood sweetheart returns to the tunnels, and Vincent reveals a painful memory of her to Catherine.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: When the Blue Bird Sings
programme.desc: Catherine meets a persistent artist, who follows and spies on her. But this artist isn't all what he seems to be.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Watcher
programme.desc: On Vincent and Catherine's two year anniversary, Catherine receives a phone message indicating that someone is watching them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Distant Shore
programme.desc: Catherine heads out to L.A California, to find a witness for an investigation.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Trial
programme.desc: Catherine is put in charge of a murder case in court, and to bring justice to a five year old murdered son.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: A Kingdom by the Sea
programme.desc: Catherine is blocked out of an investigation involving a murder attempt by the C.I.A. But there are more shocks yet to come, and a familiar face returns.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: The Hollow Men
programme.desc: Vincent witnesses their latest murder and is unable to stop them.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: What Rough Beast
programme.desc: Catherine is attacked in the park by two men disguised as policemen.

programme.title: Beauty and the Beast: Ceremony of Innocence
programme.desc: Following the death of investigative reporter, Bernie Spirko, Elliot Burch and Catherine set out to find the man who hired and killed Spirko.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Two
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Odyssey of Flight 33
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mr. Dingle, the Strong
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Static
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Joy Ride/Private Channel
programme.desc: Four teens take a recently deceased man's classic car for a joyride. / On an airplane, a storm transforms a boy's walkman into a telepathic device that informs him that the man sitting next to him is carrying a bomb.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Voices in the Earth
programme.desc: In the far future, an expedition returns to a desolate barren Earth where a scientist begins to see the ghosts of those who died years ago.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Song of the Younger World
programme.desc: In 1916 a girl and a young man from a reformatory for wayward boys fall in love and try to get away from her father, the superintendent. He finds out and doesn't approve of their love, locking away his daughter and punishing the boy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Girl I Married
programme.desc: An attorney and his wife have successful careers. They feel something is lacking in their marriage. Soon, they encounter younger versions of their mates.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Prime Mover
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Long Distance Call
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: 100 Yards over the Rim
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Rip Van Winkle Caper
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Curious Case of Edgar Witherspoon
programme.desc: A woman tries to get her Uncle Edgar committed, believing that he is senile. The investigating doctor finds Edgar living in an apartment containing all kinds of junk.
programme.sub-title: The Curious Case of Edgar Witherspoon

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Extra Innings
programme.desc: Ex-baseball player Ed Hamler, lame from an injury and forced to retire early is given a 1909 baseball card of a player that looks exactly like him. The card is magical in that he becomes drawn into it and lives out the life of the player in the past.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Crossing
programme.desc: A stressed-out priest repeatedly encounters a station wagon containing a young girl. The car keeps crashing and bursting into flames.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hunters
programme.desc: A young boy falls into an undiscovered cave near a housing project. An archeologist studies strange paintings on its walls and then bizarre things begin to happen. Cave items move around and animals are killed and brought into the cave.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Silence
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Shadow Play
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Mind and the Matter
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policemen try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Martian Please Stand Up

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Dream Me a Life
programme.desc: A man in a retirement home dreams of a woman holding back a monster, and in real life realizes the woman is his cataleptic neighbor.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Memories
programme.desc: A hypnotist who specializes in helping people relive their past lives tries to find her own history. She hypnotizes herself and when she awakens, she learns that everyone can now remember their past lives. They also desperately want to forget them.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Hellgramite Method
programme.desc: An alcoholic goes through an extremely painful and potentially deadly cure for his drinking problem. He has to choose which is more important - the bottle or his life.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Our Selina is Dying
programme.desc: A young woman, Debra, comes to live with her mysterious family, including the dying patriarch Selena. After Selena clutches Debra's hand firmly leaving an odd spot on it, Debra begins to age very fast while Selena rejuvenates.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Obsolete Man
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Two
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Arrival
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Shelter
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Call
programme.desc: A lonely man accidentally phones the wrong number and finds an intriguing female to whom he grows attached. When she refuses to meet him, he investigates and finds the phone in a museum next to the statue of a woman.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Trance
programme.desc: A scam artist purports to channel the spirit of Delos, a former inhabitant of Atlantis. Together with a partner, he makes a living off of it.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Acts of Terror
programme.desc: A woman terrorized by her abusive husband finds some small consolation in a statue of a dog given to her by her sympathetic sister

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Twenty-Twenty Vision
programme.desc: Newly promoted bank loan officer Warren Cribbens cracks his eyeglasses and discovers he can see the future through them. Faced with seeing the future of the farmers whose farms he must foreclose on, Warren can't bring himself to foreclose.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Passersby
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: A Game of Pool
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Mirror
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina Gets Her License (Part 2)
programme.desc: Sabrina learns about the responsibilities that come with using magic when she earns her witch’s learner’s permit.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dummy For Love
programme.desc: Sabrina takes advantage of Vice Principal Kraft’s attraction to Aunt Hilda.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Dante’s Inferno
programme.desc: Sabrina learns not to date outside of her realm after a bad evening with a witch boy.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A Doll’s Story
programme.desc: Babysitting becomes a test of ingenuity when Sabrina’s bratty little cousin turns her into a doll.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Boy
programme.desc: The mysteries of men are revealed when Sabrina poses as a boy to figure out how they think.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It
programme.desc: Halloween is a scary night indeed when Sabrina and her aunts try to throw a normal party
programme.sub-title: A River Of Candy Corn Runs Through It

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: Witch Trash
programme.desc: A family feud erupts when hillbilly cousins (Loni Anderson and Alice Ghostley) arrive from the Other Realm.

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch: To Tell A Mortal
programme.desc: It’s Friday the 13th, and for one day only, Sabrina can tell her friends she’s a witch.

programme.desc: Sabrina’s lack of attention with detail causes bad side effects to her magic.
