programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjengen (egentlig Danny) omvandler Shore Store til en stor prisgalla når de feirer 15 år sammen! Kjøttbollene foreslår at de skal finne kjærligheten til Vinnys mamma.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1
programme.desc: Gjengen gjenforenes for å feire 15 år med kaos og ikoniske øyeblikk. Fra Cape Mays spøkelsesjakt til Nicoles familebakgrunnsreise. Første del viser overraskelser, favorittminner og det store spørsmålet: er Sammi og Ronnie klare til å skvære opp?
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 1

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation
programme.desc: Gjenforeningen fortsetter med sol, skygge og sjokkøyeblikk. Gjengen opplever drama og moro på Jamaica. Er Angelina og Lauren fortsatt låst i "småunge"-krangelen? Pluss favorittøyeblikk, overraskelsesgjester og latter i løpet av 15 år med strandliv.
programme.sub-title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation Reunion del 2

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: What's in the Bag?
programme.desc: Etter fem år fra hverandre, skal våre favoritt-guidos gjenforenes i Miami under en familieferie, men The Situations juridiske problemer setter ferien hans i fare.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Ring
programme.desc: Ronnie og Deenas uløste problemer kommer opp til overflaten igjen, og når The Situation ankommer, er hele familien samlet.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Sunday Vinday
programme.desc: Ronnie tetter alle toalettene i huset og Nicole og Vinnys felles fortid setter vennskapet deres på spill.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Ron Ron Juice
programme.desc: En natt med Ron-Ron Juice har snudd hele huset på hodet, og en fransk pike på nattklubben får Ronnie til å sette spørsmålstegn ved alt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: About Last Night
programme.desc: Ronnie spinner helt ute av kontroll etter å ha tatt utrolig dårlige valg natten før, og Mike har store nyheter å fortelle.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatball Down
programme.desc: Vinnie opplever en klippekatastrofe, guttekvelden ødelegges av en full tulling, og Ronnie må ta en telefon til moren til barnet sitt.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Baby Mama Drama
programme.desc: Ron setter forholdet sitt i fare når han prøver å plukke opp en stripper, og hele huset er stressa når moren til babyen til Ron skal komme - Jen.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Temptation of the Keto Guido
programme.desc: Snooki tas på fersken når hun stjeler fra en stripper, Vinny blir fristet og synder kanskje, og Pauly D leter etter kjærlighet.
programme.sub-title: The Temptation of the Keto Guido

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Umm, Hello
programme.desc: Det er guttas helg og jentene skal hjem og besøke sine kjære. Med jentene ute av huset bestemmer Pauly seg for å invitere deres tidligere samboer, Angelina, til Miami.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Meatball Training Day
programme.desc: Angelina er tilbake i Miami og huset er i full gang igjen. Etter år med konflikter og tumulter - klarer Angelina å komme på godfot med sine gamle samboere?

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Angelina Leaves Her Mark!
programme.desc: Guidoene fortsetter festen på Bahamas, og Angelina forlater gjengen på sjokkerende vis.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: JWoww vs. The Proposal
programme.desc: Ronnie er på vei utfor igjen, Vinny får en smak av hjemme, og irritasjon mellom Mike og Jwoww kan ødelegge Mikes frieri.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Future Mrs. Situation?
programme.desc: Ronnie setter spørsmålstegn ved alt, mens Mike forbereder seg på å fri til Lauren.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: The Final Supper
programme.desc: Utblåsninger serveres med knyttnever under den siste familiemiddagen når det koker over for Ronnie og The Situation.

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Snookiest Moments
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Snooki, Deena og Pauly teller ned Snookis 15 morsomste, mest opprørende og uforglemmelige duste-øyeblikk.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Snookiest Moments

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Hottest Hookups
programme.desc: Vinny, Mike, Deena og Pauly teller ned de 15 heiteste Jersey Shore-dates fra Seaside til Miami til Italy og tilbake igjen.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Hottest Hookups

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Biggest Blow-ups
programme.desc: Jenni, Ronnie, Vinny, Pauly og Mike teller ned de 14 største kranglene som har skjedd i Jersey Shore-serien, og ser tilbake på de beste fornærmelsene, slagene og slåsskampene.
programme.sub-title: Road to Vacation: Jersey Shore's Biggest Blow-ups

programme.title: Jersey Shore Family Vacation: Most Jersiest Moments
programme.desc: Mike, Pauly, Ronnie og Vinny treffes og ser tilbake på de 'Jersieste' øyeblikkene fra deres familieferie i Miami. Vi ser de beste spiralene, de aller morsomste pussene, de verste toalettene og fem scener som vi aldri har fått se før.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon prays for a second chance, Ruthie prays for a pony, and Matt meets the girl he believes is the answer to his prayer.
programme.sub-title: Say a Little Prayer for Me

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Eric worries that a killer might go free, when he sits on a jury in a cop-killer trial.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary dreams about playing basketball for the Pros, while Matt decides to make his dreams come true in New York.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: A troubled young girl seeks Eric's counsel, but runs away before he can help her.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: A new orderly at the hospital is spreading vicious rumors about Matt.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: In this first part of the season cliffhanger, Shana's back in Matt's life, Lucy has to choose between two boys, Simon breaks up with his girlfriend, and Mary's thinking of moving out.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: In the conclusion on this two-part episode, Matt and his girlfriend realize it's over, and Mary must decide whether she wants to spend the rest of her life with Robbie.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: A new school year finds Simon, Matt, and Lucy living the single life again.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary treads on shaky ground when she loses her job and gets caught in a lie.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Each member of the Camden household is either the victim or the perpetrator of the classic Friday night stand up.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Lucy discovers the boy she wants to kiss spent time in a mental hospital.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary's new friends at work could be turning her toward substance abuse.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Matt, Simon and Lucy try to save Mary from ruthless debt collectors.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Mary is sent to live with her grandfather in Buffalo against her will.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camdens are torn apart by harsh rumors after Mary's departure to Buffalo.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Simon's new friends target Lucy and Annie as victims of their harassment.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: The Camden clan thinks Eric has lost it when he opens the home to Mary's ex- boyfriend.

programme.title: 7th Heaven
programme.desc: Robbie is such a good house guest that Annie and Matt feel underappreciated.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in China and America NO
programme.desc: I en tid da mange kinesere ble solgt til amerikanske jernbaneselskaper som behandlet dem brutalt med tøffe arbeidsforhold, reiser Wong Fei-hung til Amerika. Men etter et bakholdsangrep blir han adskilt fra de andre han reiser med.

programme.title: Magnificent Bodyguards NO
programme.desc: En kung fu-kjempe blir leid inn for å lede livvaktene til en døende mann, og eskortere ham til legen. Men for å komme seg dit må de passere Stormy Hills-området, fullt av banditter, villmenn og onde munker.

programme.title: The Fearless Hyena NO
programme.desc: Young Lung viser talent, men tar ikke treningen seriøst. Bestefaren hans, også Shaolin-mester, prøver å lære ham både disiplin og kampsport, men han tar mest til seg det siste. I stedet for å fokusere på treningen, tilbringer han tiden i barer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III NO
programme.desc: Det hele begynner med en at en magisk spire transporterer deres gode venn April gjennom tid og rom, helt til samuraienes Japan. Leonardo og gjengen drar med en gang etter henne, og må nå beseire den onde Lord Naringa for å redde April.

programme.title: The Young Master NO
programme.desc: Etter at Dragon har blitt bedratt av sin egen bror, Tiger, står de to som representanter for rivaliserende skoler i den årlige løvedansekonkurransen. Selv om Tiger vinner, blir han tvunget til eksil av skammen over å ha sveket sine egne.

programme.title: Winners and Sinners NO
programme.desc: Fem gode venner blir løslatt fra fengsel, fast bestemt på å leve lovlydige liv fra nå av. Sammen starter de et rengjøringsfirma, og starten på deres nye liv er et faktum. Men samme dag løslates også en sjette fange som har en motsatt plan.

programme.title: Armor of God 2: Operation Condor NO
programme.desc: Eventyreren i Jackie Chans skikkelse er tilbake i en ny jakt etter en bortgjemt skatt, skjult i ørkenen av nazistene før andre verdenskrig. Men Jackie og kompanjongen hans Ada er ikke de eneste som leter etter skatten...

programme.title: The Young Master NO
programme.desc: Etter at Dragon har blitt bedratt av sin egen bror, Tiger, står de to som representanter for rivaliserende skoler i den årlige løvedansekonkurransen. Selv om Tiger vinner, blir han tvunget til eksil av skammen over å ha sveket sine egne.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars NO
programme.desc: Politimannen Muscle fra Hong Kong drar til Japan på jakt etter en korrupt kollega. Men siden yakuzaen allerede har opplysninger om ham, kan han ikke gjøre jobben på egen hånd. Etter hvert kaller de inn barndomsvennene til Muscle for å hjelpe til.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has made a resolution to quit smoking and he announces it to everyone at the diner.
programme.sub-title: Smoke em if You Got em

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Margaret has an erotic dream about John and Linda tries to analyze it. Reggie, Jake and Bob get drunk off a keg of beer. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John has anxiety issues over dating a younger woman and Reggie is getting threats from an ex-convict. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Christmas turns Reggie into a competitive freak; Bob, a greedy super; Jake, a non-participant and John an Angry Head.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John inherits an urn with one of his old patients, Harry in it.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker has a run-in at the office with an elder hostile Jake's grandmother.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie makes John a test subject in her psychology experiment and Jake gets his driver's license renewed. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker goes on a cruise and Jake dates a supermodel. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is asked to be the keynote speaker at an early graduation for Harding High schools class of 2001.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: After her marriage ends, Megan re-enters Becker's life and he becomes aware of Megan's sordid past. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Linda and Reggie date the same man and Becker unwillingly gets involved. Bob finds out he has a tenant whos a prostitute. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John Becker has insomnia and the gang tries to help him get through it. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John runs into an old college mentor/professor who doesn't remember him. This torments John who tries to get the professor to remember him. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets an unexpected visit from his godson who is reluctant to tell his father he's gay. Reggie gets into a caddy argument with her friend, Sara. (TV-PG)
programme.sub-title: You Say Gay Son, I Say Godson

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John thinks the new water deliveryman is bad luck. A string of mishaps occur and everyone blames it on the deliveryman. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is being sued for malpractice by a patient. Louis knits Margaret a swest (sweater/vest) and Reggie, Bob and Jake discuss the worst ways to die. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Beckers patient sues him for malpractice and Bob sleeps with his Johns lawyer, Ruth. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Becoming Respectable
programme.desc: In 1924, Hitler is convicted for High Treason after the failed Nazi power grab. In prison, he writes Mein Kampf, articulating his anti-Semitic and expansionist beliefs. Upon release, Hitler rebrands the Nazi Party.

programme.title: The Real Oppenheimer
programme.desc: I 1945 ble verden ført inn i atomalderen. Rollen hans som "Father of the Bomb" var satt , og Oppenheimer ble stadig mer bekymret for den potensielle faren denne vitenskapelige oppfinnelser kunne utgjøre for menneskeheten.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler
programme.desc: In Hitler’s Germany, those with Jewish ancestry faced harsh Nuremberg Laws. Full Jews faced death; Mischlinge endured discrimination, job bans. Some, like Helmut Schmidt, unaware of heritage, found protectors like Milch in high places.
programme.sub-title: The Jews Who Fought for Hitler

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: The German invasion of Russia from Operation Barbarossa on 22 June 1941 to Kursk on 5 July 1943.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Surprising Beginnings
programme.desc: Tyske kommandører oppdager effektiviteten i å gasse fanger, og Auschwitz forvandles fra en liten bakgårdsleir for de som motarbeider den nazistiske okkupasjonen av Polen, til en storstilt utryddelsesleir for jøder.

programme.title: Secret War: Christine Granville
programme.desc: Christine Granville, aka Krystyna Skarbek, a brave SOE agent, secured the release of captured comrades from the Gestapo before Operation Dragoon, earning the George Medal.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: The Dutch Collaborator
programme.desc: Anton Adriaan Mussert, initially resisted Hitler’s anti-Semitism despite modeling his NSB party, even welcoming Jewish members. His failed attempt to kidnap Queen Wilhelmina led him into hiding, after which he collaborated in hopes of gaining power.

programme.title: Auschwitz: The Nazis and the Final Solution: Orders and Initiatives
programme.desc: Höss håndterer komplikasjoner som oppstår fra det midlertidige gaskammeret og økende etterspørsel ettersom nazistene begynner å feie hele Europa for flere mennesker å ta med til Auschwitz og drepe.

programme.title: Signs of Evil - The Runes of the SS
programme.desc: The symbol of the SS stands for terror and the murder of millions. Documentary about the history of a symbol that represents murder.

programme.title: Secret War: The SAS Italian Job
programme.desc: In 1945, during the Italian Spring offensive, SOE agent Michael Lees and SAS officer Roy Farran led a raid on German HQs at Villa Rossi and Villa Calvi. Despite orders to cancel, Farran attacked with SAS men and partisans, killing many Germans.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators: Traitor-in-Chief
programme.desc: Pierre Laval, once celebrated and later reviled, faced execution in 1945 for collaboration with the Nazis during Vichy France. Originally a socialist and pacifist, he fell into collaboration for power and to navigate the horrors of occupation.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Island War
programme.desc: The Marines succeed in the "island hopping" strategy against suicidal resistance. The US Navy establishes supremacy, cutting off Japan.

programme.title: The Rise of the Nazi Party: Hitler's Biggest Blunder
programme.desc: Hitler rules Europe triumphantly, hailed as a hero in Germany. Hitler invades the Soviet Union, promising swift victory over communism, but progress stalls. As Germany faces setbacks, Hitler retreats to his bunker in Poland, increasingly reliant on drugs.

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: Lightning War
programme.desc: Country after European country falls before the unstoppable German blitzkrieg.

programme.title: Secret War: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco
programme.desc: After WWII, SOE disbanded, leaving Vera Atkins to uncover fates of 118 agents, including 13 women. Many were betrayed and sent to camps; some were executed. Atkins' quest continued, marked by personal impact and delayed recognition.
programme.sub-title: The Spymistress and the French Fiasco

programme.title: World War II in HD Colour: The Soviet Steamroller
programme.desc: Their attack on the Soviet Union having failed, the German Army suffers a series of counter-offensives on the Eastern Front. Wehrmacht's losses are huge as the Soviets advance West.

programme.title: Weapons That Changed the World
programme.desc: The Colt M1911, designed by John Moses Browning, is the 20th century's most influential pistol. Its .45 ACP cartridge made it the U.S. military's standard for 75 years. Wil Willis tests it to explore its stopping power.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Elle Macpherson and the judges Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed continue their UK tour, in Cardiff and Birmingham. They audition more girls hoping to make it in the world of modelling.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: Grace Woodward, Julien Macdonald and Charley Speed judge the final round of auditions, giving hopefuls one last chance to secure a place at the boot camp

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls who have made it through the audition stage battle it out in boot camp. Twelve girls will be chosen to move into the house and the next stage of the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls face their first challenge after moving into the house and learn there will be a double elimination this week. Janice Dickinson helps decide who will be the first two girls eliminated from the competition.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models are given complete makeovers before posing nude for a photo shoot. George Lamb joins the judging panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The girls have to pose with different birds of prey and tensions there ends up being tension between some of the girls. Jasmine Guinness joins the judging panel to decide who will be eliminated this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The models go one-on-one interviews with The Wanted but for some girls the mistakes just keep coming. Fashion designer Henry Holland joins the judges at panel and it becomes time to rise and smize or become a catwalk casualty.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The seven remaining girls face another double elimination this week and find themselves being thrown in at the deep end. Katie Price joins the judges on the panel this week.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The final five girls left in the running complete in a beauty shoot before preparing to fly off to Miami. In a dramatic turn of events one of the girls is left behind and her place in the contest becomes uncertain.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: In Miami, the top four girls must try their hands at acting, before shaking their pompoms and becoming brides for the day

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: It's the penultimate week of the contest, and four girls remain. The quartet attend 'go sees' and complete the last photo shoot of the series. Who will make the final?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model
programme.desc: From thousands of hopefuls, just two remain to battle it out on the catwalk. Who will Elle Macpherson crown as Britain & Ireland's Next Top Model?

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 1
programme.desc: The show returns for an eighth series with 20 contestants all competing to impress judges Elle Macpherson, Tyson Beckford, Whitney Port and Julien Macdonald to win a contract with Models 1.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 2
programme.desc: The remaining 17 contestants meet with the judges for one-on-one interviews and are scheduled to have a photo shoot with camels in the desert, but it gets canceled due to a sandstorm.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 3
programme.desc: The 13 contestants move into the model house and have a housewarming party, where they are visited by Cycle 7 winner Jade Thompson.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 4
programme.desc: The remaining 12 contestants receive makeovers at the Daniel Galvin salon and get their teeth whitened before being treated to a day out at a skating disco.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 5
programme.desc: The contestants go to the Hurlingham Academy and meet image consultant Vernon Francois for a challenge in which they decorate t-shirts and talk about their insecurities in a motivational speech for the school's students.

programme.title: Britain's Next Top Model: Episode 6
programme.desc: The contestants shoot a mock commercial for Alcatel, where they pretend to talk to their lover over the phone with a script written in French.

programme.desc: When Adam and Andi lose footage of an intimate moment they accidentally recorded, they have to track it down before anyone can see it.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Andi's folks decide to visit them for Easter, Adam and Andi have to keep the peace between both sets of parents.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam insists that pranks are harmless fun, Andi creates an elaborate hoax to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is determined to figure out what Andi's hiding when he discovers she's been keeping secrets from him for his own good.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled and honored to help Joe buy a new car but is caught off guard when Joe suddenly becomes irritable, and the negotiations go off track.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Don realize they need to bring in more business, they film a commercial advertising their company.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi set up Adam's boss on a date to boost her spirits in the hope that she'll then be in the mood to have Adam resume work on the mini-mall.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Andi proposes an exciting idea for Adam and her to go into business together when she isn't able to find work. Also, Adam tackles the most challenging job of his life - renovating Joe and Bev's (Swoosie Kurtz) kitchen.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam attempts to make the office feel more inviting since Andi will be joining him at work every day; Lowell hides a life-changing secret.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and Andi have a disagreement at the office and must prevent it from becoming a problem at home; the kids try to extend Lowell's stay at their house after realizing he's an amazing cook.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam sees a kid push Emme, he convinces Teddy to defend his younger sister; Adam and Don persuade Joe to hire a nurse to help him after he has his upcoming knee surgery.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: Adam and the guys visit Lowell at his new bachelor pad and start using it to get away from their home lives; Andi keeps pushing Adam for her own desk at the office.

programme.title: Man With A Plan
programme.desc: When Adam catches Kate sneaking back into the house at night, he is determined to fix the behavior with old-school parenting tactics; Andi is dismayed when she can't find many baby pictures of Emme.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: From Arima Onsen comes the vice president of Japan Chef's Association, Challenger Tadamichi Ota. Will Iron Chef Sakai be able to capture a victory in this battle of octopus?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The head chef of the two-star restaurant L'Amphycles, Philippe Groult is determined to defeat Iron Chef Sakai in this oyster onslaught.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chairman Kaga pits two of his Iron Chefs against each other for the annual Mr. Iron Chef Tournament. Chen and Sakai go head-to-head for the chance to challenge the defending champion.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The heated battle between Chen and Sakai reveals Chen as the winner, who now has to go against the reigning Mr. Iron Chef, Michiba.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Chen takes on Michiba in the Mr. Iron Chef Tournament. Will Chen take the honor and title of this year's Mr. Iron Chef, or will Michiba get to retire with a second Mr. Iron Chef title?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Jinyi Gao, the head chef of Grand Hotel, Taiwan's number-one hotel, goes against Iron Chef Chen, who has never lost except in the New Year's battle. Who will reign supreme in this shellfish showdown?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Curry powder is a difficult seasoning to use as a main ingredient. How will Iron Chef Sakai tackles this theme ingredient against Challenger Hidetoshi Ushimaru?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Who will get stung when a dangerous-looking fish is this week's theme ingredient? Challenger Hiroshi Yamanobe is a chef from the seaside and determined to win, no matter what.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kandagawa sends his challenger Jinichi Tateyama to take on his mentor in French cuisine, Iron Chef Sakai. The heat will be on as Kandagawa's faction seeks victory.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Will Iron Chef Chen be ready for Takaya Nakazawa, a challenger from Shizuoka who happens to know everything about Chinese vegetarian dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Nakamura makes his Kitchen Stadium debut. His first opponent, Kiyoshi Suzuki, is from the world-famous Club des Trentes school of cooking.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: As a leading figure in Japanese cuisine, Tatsujiro Yoshida has tackled the rough waves of the sea of Japan. Will Yoshida have what it takes when surf is up at Kitchen Stadium?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Senji Osada deploys 'vacuum cooking,' a French cooking technique born in the 21st century. Will Senji have what it takes in his battle of scallop dishes with Iron Chef Sakai?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kunbi Lin's former battle at Kitchen Stadium against the legendary Iron Chef Nakamura finished in a draw. Will Lin be able to claim victory this time?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: The long-awaited challenger Katsuaki Mori has been awarded the prestigious 'Chevalier du Taste-Fromage,' France's highest honor for cheese.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: It's only rookie Iron Chef Nakamura's third battle. Will he be able to withstand Challenger Toyoaki Suganuma's egg challenge?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Challenger Gyobun Hou is ready to chop the lettuce with confidence against Iron Chef Chen. Who will reign supreme when we witness this legendary leafy battle?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chefs always have trouble with female challengers. How will Iron Chef Nakamura fight back against Katsuko Nanao's affectionate home-cooked dishes?

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Iron Chef Chen is ready to display his skills in spicy Szechuan cooking against Kitchen Stadium's first challenger specializing in Thai cuisine, Shunji Morikawa. Be ready for a very 'hot' battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef
programme.desc: Kitchen Stadium fills with the scent of the sea when Challenger Tamotsu Takao, a French restaurant specialist, takes on Iron Chef Sakai.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Factory workers ignore ground-water contamination, even though it is making their children sick. As a result, Jonathan takes drastic measures to force them to face the facts.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A minor-league baseball team never wins, so Jonathan and Mark set out to help them. They also come to the aid of an elderly vendor who has been kicked out of the stadium.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The lead actor in a Broadway play claims that God is attending the show's performances, sitting in a third-row orchestra seat.
programme.sub-title: The Smile in the Third Row

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The teenage daughter of Mark's friend tries to find her biological mother. It may tear the family apart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark connect a young blind woman with a disfigured artist.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark's friend Scotty is on hand to provide legal assistance. He defends the young artist with a facial deformity who has been accused of assaulting a blind girl.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark go to work at a football team. They learn that one of the players has been getting drugs from the team doctor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A homeless boy wishes that someone would love him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a bullied orphan whose eccentric grandfather is in danger of losing him to a heartless social worker.
programme.sub-title: Close Encounters of the Heavenly Kind

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark switches places with an attractive movie star who has a low opinion of men.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must help his own widow regain her love for life.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An errant angel has been on probation for two centuries because he's always breaking the rules.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A father attempts to have a memorial made to commemorate his son who was killed in Vietnam.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark asks Jonathan to help erase everything bad that's happened to him recently. Mark's idea is to create his own vision of heaven on Earth.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A dying woman was forced to leave a son behind in the Soviet Union during World War II.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Tragedy occurs when a Neo-Nazi disputes the Holocaust with the son of a death camp survivor.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a novelist who's given up. Also, they motivate the man's grandson, who has yet to tap into his literary potential.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When her cow is killed by a train, Lucy Tutaine is outraged by the indifference to her financial loss.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: The story of Amadeo Giannini and the creation of the Bank of America.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A rancher who has been threatened refuses Matt's help.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Mr. Buntline's Vacation
programme.desc: Ned Buntline arrives in Dodge City broke looking for help from Earp who is happy to help in return for the Buntline special.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A marshal takes on a mission to retrieve a stolen wedding dress while an outlaw gang runs wild.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Townspeople protect an outlaw they believe has reformed.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: John Wesley Hardin
programme.desc: John Wesley Hardin comes to Wichita to seek revenge on Earp for running his friend Clemens out of Wichita.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A four-dollar lawsuit is brought against an insurance company by a farmer who claims he was cheated.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: The Bounty Killer
programme.desc: Col. Benteen asks Earp to help with a string of murders in the outlaw area called Robber's Roost. Earp agrees to investigate and finds himself working with outlaws.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Matt finds a cabin to shelter himself from a blizzard, only to learn it is occupied by a pair of bank robbers.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Even though Doc has confessed to murdering the man that shot his horse, Matt is unwilling to arrest him.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A love triangle develops involving a mild-mannered man, a tough female prospector and her long-lost husband.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: A Papa for Butch and Ginger
programme.desc: Wyatt's deputy, Shotgun Gibbs, runs off a saddle bum who was hassling a pretty young widow who had hired him to help her go to Colorado.
programme.sub-title: A Papa for Butch and Ginger

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: When Claypool swindles McSween out of his gold mine, storekeeper Hobart has an idea for retribution.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: It Had to Happen
programme.desc: After Bat's shirt sleeve is hit by a bullet from a gunman Earp had hit in the shoulder, Mayor Kelley tell Earp he must shoot to kill which causes him to have second thoughts about his job.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A minister's attempts to rebuild a church in Carson City are blocked by a saloon owner.

programme.title: The Life and Legend of Wyatt Earp: Clay Allison
programme.desc: Pete Albright tries to hire gunfighter Clay Allison to kill Earp to open up Dodge City. Allison won't take money but is willing to kill Earp.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: A former prospector is hired by a young woman to find her fiancé, who became lost in the mountains.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: John Thompson wants to get the mail out during the winters and comes up with creative ways to make it happen.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Doc Adams considers it a threat to both him and his patients when a woman doctor arrives to become his replacement.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A gunman kills a young challenger and becomes a target for revenge—from his own son, as well as the victim's family.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: In the conclusion of a two-part episode, Ben Snow tries to get his long-hidden gold back to civilization to use in fighting an old enemy.

programme.title: Death Valley Days
programme.desc: Justin Gates must save a boy deathly ill after swallowing a concoction offered by a medicine man.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A cattle baron and a legendary frontiersman involve Marshal Matt Dillon in their life-and-death dispute over a hat.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A notorious gang of marauders known as The Dog Soldiers swears vengeance against Matt Dillon for the execution of one of their members.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' hogger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood ned trær med noen 'Tømmerflopper', får seg noen 'Luftige-svev-madrasser' og har det kjempekult på 'Rockeførskolen'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' havner Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood i 'Faresoner', avklarer ulike situasjoner av 'Glassknas' og oppnår betydelig høyde med 'Flygebiler'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' møter Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood ufokuserte fedre med 'Distraherte pappahjerner', driver høyt spill i golf med 'Djerv gjenvinning' og viser sine fiseferdigheter når de utfører 'Gasstriks'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' oppsummerer Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood kostnadene ved å ha barn i 'Dyre barn', snubler over sirkusartister som lager 'Plutselig sirkus' og opplever slitsomme feiringer med 'Dårlige bursdager'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' denger Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood hodet i veggen som første trekk i 'Kraftskaller', ødelegger golfutstyret sitt i 'På tide med nye køller' og møter farene ved å benytte 'Samkjøring om natten'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' utforsker Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood ildidrettens verden i 'Flammesport', finner ut hvor farlige dører kan være i 'Helt av hengslene' og blir overrasket over noen svært 'Uventede raketter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' krasjer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood inn i ubevegelige gjenstander i 'Parkert smerte', oppdager at trafikkflyten kan påvirkes av bisarre årsaker i 'Motorveiforsinkelser' og opplever farene ved 'Olme okser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' støter Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på farlige voltere uten 'Saltobevissthet', opplever smerten ved knuste tohjulinger i Billigsykler' og oppdager at heis og fyll ikke går så godt sammen i 'Heisa-heistur'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood LXXI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood å muntre opp folk som er 'Vinterdeppa', finner ut hva som skjer når du faller og opplever 'Fjes mot gjerde' og ødelegger perfekte øyeblikk med 'Triste forlovelsesopptak'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' lider Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood av 'Konsertforvirring', får smaken på 'Søvnsnacks' og flykter fra noen 'Hissige sammenstøt'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og medvert Lolo Wood det tøft når de flytter ut og blir 'Såre flyttefolk', møter noen nye medarbeidere som er 'Dumme på jobben' og finner ut at det er greit å gi opp i 'Vi kutter ut'

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' går Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood på trynet i gresset idet de 'Eter plen', blir veltrent og hårete med muskelforbundne 'Gymhunder' og går langt under null i 'Dypfryst moro'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' er Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood en fare for seg selv i 'Selvfelling', drar på gymet for å få seg en 'Boksesekktrøkk' og går langt i å utfordre høydeskrekken med 'Elleville høyder'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne 'Ridiculousness' har Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood med en spesiell gjest, Dee Snider, og møter rebeller i 'Tenker ikke å tåle det', opplever band som sliter i 'Kommer ikke til å slå gjennom' og blir nedstemt av spilt kaffe i 'Kaffetragedier'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood på konsekvensene ved å overse skilt i 'Skiltblind', lærer om merkelige ting som er 'Teknisk sett sant' og finner ut hvordan sprø ting blir 'Sprøere og sprøere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood syklister få seg en overraskelse i 'Uventede sykkelhinder', møter ondskapsfulle katter som viser 'Kattevrede' før de tar en titt på folk som setter hodet fast i 'Skallefeller'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' prøver Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah seg på 'Kostymekatastrofer', kommer i kontakt med 'Etikettefjerne folk' og blir vitner til 'Nære på-overganger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood se folk som snus opp ned av 'Påtvungne overslag', får seg en drink og to for mye med 'Pussa bestemødre' og finner ut grunnen til å unngå dansing med drinker i 'Ikke drikk og dans'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' med Rob, Steelo og Kristy Sarah får vi se strålende treffsikkerhet i 'Skallesnikskyting', finner ut av hva som er motsatt av å prestere under press i 'Vanære under press' og avslutter med noen 'Sjalu hjerter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' drar Rob, Steelo og gjestevert Lolo Wood for å skate med gjenstander på hjul som er 'Park-uforenlig', tar bilder og får seg en smell i 'Knipseattakk' og holder fast på verdisakene i møte med 'Mobile skurker'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' opplever Rob, Steelo og spesialgjest Lolo Wood at selv dommere kan oppleve stygge 'Dommertreff', at de kan bli fiskemat under 'Vannattakk og de hopper over instruksjoner i 'Anvisningskaos'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood imot høyhastighetpresanger i 'Gaver i forbifarten', opplever massiv bråstopp i 'Løperhinder' og blir opprørt av 'Kritiske mødre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' foretar Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood litt amatørmessig jordforflytning med 'Helgedosere', tar med ungene i butikken i 'Shoppingmonstere' og setter nesen sørover og opplever litt 'Landsens vrede'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' feirer Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood noen første smeller som ektepar med 'Første store feilsteg', prøver å kommunisere med berusede ved å 'Snakke fyllisk' og opplever fryktløse folk som er 'Slangesikre'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XXXIX
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' holder Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Lolo Wood hodet høyt for å unngå 'Baller fra oven', tar et lett kaotisk bad og opplever full 'Badekarinvasjon' og får hører den ufiltrerte sannheten av 'Søte små kritikere'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' morer Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg i parkeringsanlegg med 'Garasjegøy', ser at avløpsåpnere kan brukes til mer enn kun nummer to i 'Mangefasetterte avløpsåpnere' og lurer døden i 'Nesten knust'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg noen ordentlige 'Foreldreoverraskelser', ruller med noen skikkelig 'Dediserte inlineløpere' og mister litt kontroll i 'Radioustyrlige'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' gjemmer Rob Dyrdek, Steelo Brim og Carly Aquilino drinken for Drikketyver', ser nye merkelige antrekk i 'Bærbare rariteter' og får andrehånds skrubbsår av trafikanter som følger regelen 'Se i begge retninger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCIV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og gjest Carly Aquilino trappene med barn som gjør noen 'Mini-feilsteg', tester senger med 'Madrassprøving' og lokaliserer alle de løse skruene i 'Oppussingsanger'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Lolo Wood XL
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' avdekker Rob, Steelo og Lolo Wood farene med døråpninger i 'Dørdengt' før de drar til havs på 'Kræsjcruise' og avslutter med noen mestere i forkledning i 'Bykamuflasje'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' slåss Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino mot vinden i 'Aggressiv luft', sliter med spisepinnene i 'Fomlepinner' og viser fram rare evner i 'Ferdigheter er ferdigheter'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' ser Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino nærmere på utsatte besteforeldre i 'Barnebarnskader', får ødelagt humøret av 'Stemningssenkere' og har det gøy med litt 'Landsens avslapping'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXV
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' tar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran sjansen på å ta seg en lur i 'Blottlagte blunder', finner nye bruksområder i tillegg til hockey i 'Nyttekøller' og får seg en trøkk fra oven med 'Takattakk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' får Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino seg en kakk i hodet når de er 'Uten høydebevissthet', får multitaskingeksamen ved 'Simultankapasitets-universitetet og betrakter barn som dras i 'Hunder med barneslep'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Carly Aquilino XCVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' blir Rob, Steelo og Carly Aquilino litt konkurransesugne i 'Utilsiktede hjulskader', opplever T-banekaos på 'Ville tog' og morer seg stort med 'Skjelettkompiser'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVI
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' forårsaker Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran alvorlige skader når de spiller 'Hjemmegolf', møter bygningsarbeidere som morer seg med 'Jobbskøyere' og blir vitner til vindens kraft i 'Tatt av vinden'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' deltar Rob, Steelo og Karrueche Tran i timen med 'Forelesningssabotører', stopper hjorter som foretar 'Bukkattakk' og flipper helt når de får seg en 'Turntrøkk'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sterling og Karrueche Tran LXVIII
programme.desc: I denne episoden av 'Ridiculousness' sklir Rob, Steelo og gjest Karrueche Tran rundt i gatene fordi de er 'Dårlig til å drifte', tar seg litt snacks med folk som liker å 'Småspise i alle situasjoner' og holder festen i gang med 'Bursdagsbomber'.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison drømmer om et schizofrent barn, men når hun møter henne i det virkelige liv, virker hun helt normal - men hun har en psykisk syk romkamerat.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison ser hele tiden ansiktet til en mann i ansiktene til andre mennesker, inkludert Joe, og må finne ut hvorfor. I mellomtiden har Ariel problemer med å sitte barnevakt for en rampete gutt.
programme.sub-title: Will the Real Fred Rovick Please Stand Up?

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison melder seg på selvforsvarskurs. I mellomtiden jobber Devalos med en tenårings voldtektssak, i tillegg til å undersøke et mistenkt mord som involverer en politimann.
programme.sub-title: How to Beat a Bad Guy

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Vi ser tilbake på Allison og Joes bryllup, og hvordan den økende styrken til Allisons "krefter" påvirket det snart gifte paret.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison og døtrene hennes har den samme drømmen om en merkelig jente som kan være knyttet til en rekke mord. I mellomtiden har Joe en ny konflikt med sjefen.
programme.sub-title: There Will Be Blood... Type A

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison oppdager at den merkelige jenta fra hennes og døtrenes drømmer er seriemorderens neste mål, og hun må beskytte jenta mot fare samtidig som hun prøver å samarbeide med henne for å fange morderen.
programme.sub-title: There Will Be Blood... Type B

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison installerer en høyteknologisk talende tyverialarm etter at en nabo blir myrdet, som hun senere oppdager kan kommunisere med Marie.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: En fortvilet Ariel begynner å miste timer og senere år av livet sitt og må se på sitt fremtidige jeg for å finne ut hvordan hun kan komme tilbake til nåtiden.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons vennskap med en gris kan lede til hvor en savnet dyrerettighetsaktivist befinner seg. I mellomtiden får Joe en spesiell bursdagsgave fra Marie.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons hjernesvulst kommer tilbake, noe som kan vise seg å få store konsekvenser for ikke bare henne, men også hennes nærmeste.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allison og Bridgette har den samme drømmen, bytter de personlighet, noe som skaper kaos for dem begge.
programme.sub-title: Bring Your Daughter to Work Day

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison begynner å se svevende symboler over folks hoder, tegn hun tror kan matche folk med partneren deres.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Scanlons hjemsøkende drømmer om sin avdøde bror får Allison til å bekymre seg for partneren sin.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison fortsetter å havne i konflikt med Scanlon når hun tror at hans avdøde bror kan være knyttet til drapet på en savnet jente.
programme.sub-title: How to Kill a Good Guy

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Etter å ha fått en hudtransplantasjon på hånden, blir Allison forvirret når den samme hånden begynner å bevege seg med en egen vilje.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når Allison ser inn i fremtiden, vokser frykten hennes når hun begynner å føle seg maktesløs til å stoppe en katastrofal hendelse fra å finne sted.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allison blir plutselig ute av stand til å forstå talespråk og utvikler et vennskap med en lingvist underveis.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons drømmer om en brann potensielt kan bidra til å løse mystiske brannrelaterte dødsfall. I tillegg lurer Devalos på neste steg i karrieren.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Allisons naboer blir rasende når en dømt seksualforbryter flytter inn i området, men Allisons visjoner får henne til å tvile på at han til og med er skyldig.

programme.title: Medium
programme.desc: Når en mann blir drept av et tog, har Allison en drøm som varsler et identisk drap.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The new school teacher may be guilty of child abuse.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela is kidnapped by the dog soldiers, and Sully vows to find her before she is killed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Jake runs for mayor against a surprising candidate--Dr. Quinn.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Hank, distraught over Myra quitting, ends up comatose.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela's love for Sully is put to the test when a stranger from her past comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Michaela's love for Sully is put to the test when a stranger from her past comes to town.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A new railroad through town means a bright future for Colorado Springs, but an uncertain one for Dr. Mike and Sully.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren and Brian plot different courses to prove they're courageous men, until danger unites them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Loren's sister, Miss Olive, has died and bequeathed her cattle to Matthew who, along with Dr. Mike, Sully, Colleen, Brian, Loren, Robert E, and Grace, attempts to bring the cattle back to a ranch near Colorado Springs.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The Cattle Drive continues with various difficulties to overcome, including conflicts between Matthew and Sully, cattle rustlers, hungry Indians, and a prairie fire. Dr. Mike delivers a calf, and Sully helps her clean up afterwards.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Elizabeth sends crates of books from Michaela's deceased father's collection, prompting her to open a public library. Many become alarmed at the content of some of the books and want to prevent people from reading them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Brian rescues a man from a trap who has horrific burns to his face from a train crash. Michaela decides to perform reconstructive surgery to repair his face.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Cloud Dancing and the rest of the Cheyenne are told to move to a reservation where they would be dependent on handouts. Dr. Mike, Sully, and the children head to Washington to lodge a complaint and get the order changed.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Arriving in Washington, Dr. Mike and Sully find it difficult to find anyone to listen to their concerns. Sully is arrested for army desertion, while a plot against the president is overheard. Michaela must break Sully out of jail to expose the conspiracy.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When money becomes short for Sully, he tries everything to make ends meet rather than accept help from Dr. Mike.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully are traveling through dangerous Indian country when their stagecoach is robbed, and they are abandoned.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike discovers a lump in Dorothy's breast and tries to convince her to have surgery. Hank tries Ladies Night at the saloon, and Jake and Loren have a plan to get free drinks. Colleen deals with hurtful boyish pranks from classmates.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tender Comrades
programme.desc: Steven og Claudia gifter seg, og dommeren henlegger saken om foreldreretten. Blake tilbyr Krystle en PR-jobb. Adam lurer Alexis til å signere blanke dokumenter.

programme.title: Dynasty: Tracy
programme.desc: Adam fabrikerer en falsk anklage om at Alexis sto bak forgiftningen, og Blake truer med å offentliggjøre historien. Mark angriper Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty: Dex
programme.desc: Jeff anklager Alexis for å forsøke å drepe ham og tar tilbake aksjene sine. Mark blir bodyguard for Alexis. Dex Dexter, sønnen til et styremedlem, foreslår at han og Alexis danner en forretningsforbindelse.

programme.title: Dynasty: Peter De Vilbis
programme.desc: Dex fortsetter sin innsats for å vinne Alexis. Jeff får vite at Adam voldtok Kirby. Krystle stortrives i PR-jobben. Fallon møter en spennende millionær på veddeløpsbanen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Proposal
programme.desc: Dex slår Alexis i kampen om en oljekontrakt. Jeff konfronterer Adam om Kirbys graviditet. Krystle sier ja til Blakes frieri. Del 1

programme.title: Dynasty: Carousel
programme.desc: Dex slår Alexis i kampen om en oljekontrakt. Jeff konfronterer Adam om Kirbys graviditet. Krystle sier ja til Blakes frieri. Del 2

programme.title: Dynasty: The Wedding
programme.desc: Adam frir til Kirby, som har til hensikt å skille seg fra Jeff. Tracy overtaler Krystle til å gi henne selskapets kredittkort og konfidensielle filer. Peter prøver seg på Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Ring
programme.desc: En fremmed hilser på lille Danny og vet hva han heter. Claudia blir bekymret og flytter familien til herskapshuset. Peter DeVilbis' arkitekt hinter om playboyens rusproblem. Kirbys hånd hovner opp.

programme.title: Dynasty: Lancelot
programme.desc: Kirbys helseproblemer fortsetter. Peter oppfordrer Fallon til å prøve kokain. Tracy saboterer Krystle på kontoret for å vinne Blake over på sin side. Veddeløpshesten Allegre blir stjålet.

programme.title: Dynasty: Seizure
programme.desc: Blake mottar et løsepengekrav for hesten. Peter kunngjør at han skal gifte seg med Fallon. Dex og Alexis blander forretninger med fonøyelser. Kirby får et anfall.

programme.title: Dynasty: A Little Girl
programme.desc: Blake blir mistenksom overfor Peter DeVilbis. Claudia mottar flere fioler fra «Lancelot». Adam forteller Blake sannheten om forgiftningen.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Accident
programme.desc: Allegre leveres tilbake og Blakes mistanker om Peters innblanding forsterkes. Tracy iscenesetter en pressekampanje for å ødelegge Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Vigil
programme.desc: Peter DeVilbis blir tatt da han forsøker å rømme landet, og blir arrestert for narkotikabesittelse og fengslet. Blake får tilbud om å jobbe i politikken. Fallon gjenvinner bevisstheten og finner ut at hun er lam.

programme.title: Dynasty: Steps
programme.desc: Alexis prøver å bestikke Kirby for å hindre henne i å gifte seg med Adam. Claudia mottar en ny pakke fra sin avdøde ektemann. Fallon kan fortsatt ikke gå, før barnets liv er i fare.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 1
programme.desc: Krystle finner ut at hun er gravid. Fallon lider av smertefull hodepine. Claudia og Steven besøker Matthews ulykkessted i Peru.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 2
programme.desc: Alexis planlegger å forpurre Blakes forretningsavtale med Rashid Ahmed. Tracy prøver å forføre Blake og får sparken. Steven blir mistenksom overfor Dex, som foretar en mystisk oppringning til Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Voice - Part 3
programme.desc: Dex finner Alexis sammen med Rashid og vender seg til Tracy for trøst. Kirby finner ut årsaken til farens død og kjøper en pistol.

programme.title: Dynasty: The Birthday
programme.desc: Kirby får vite sannheten om farens selvmord. Krystle forteller en forbløffet Alexis om graviditeten. Fallon og Jeff kunngjør at de skal gifte seg på nytt.
